We also provide a theoretical analysis in a simplified linear setting, which shows that caution provably improves over the standard BoN approach. Together, our results not only establish caution as a practical solution to reward hacking, but also provide evidence that curiosity-based approaches can be a general OOD detection technique in LLM settings.

</details>


### [378] [Grokking as Dimensional Phase Transition in Neural Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04655)
*Ping Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 神经网络"顿悟"现象是一种维度相变，当有效维度D从亚临界(D<1)跨越到超临界(D>1)时发生，表现出自组织临界性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究神经网络中的"顿悟"现象——从记忆到泛化的突然转变，这挑战了我们对学习动力学的理解。

Method: 通过八个模型尺度的梯度雪崩动力学的有限尺寸缩放分析，研究有效维度D的变化，比较合成i.i.d.高斯梯度与真实训练中的梯度场几何。

Result: 发现顿悟是一种维度相变：有效维度D在泛化开始时从亚扩散(亚临界，D<1)跨越到超扩散(超临界，D>1)，表现出自组织临界性。D反映梯度场几何而非网络架构。

Conclusion: 顿悟局部化的D(t)跨越现象在不同拓扑结构中都具有鲁棒性，为过参数化网络的可训练性提供了新的见解。

Abstract: Neural network grokking -- the abrupt memorization-to-generalization transition -- challenges our understanding of learning dynamics. Through finite-size scaling of gradient avalanche dynamics across eight model scales, we find that grokking is a \textit{dimensional phase transition}: effective dimensionality~$D$ crosses from sub-diffusive (subcritical, $D < 1$) to super-diffusive (supercritical, $D > 1$) at generalization onset, exhibiting self-organized criticality (SOC). Crucially, $D$ reflects \textbf{gradient field geometry}, not network architecture: synthetic i.i.d.\ Gaussian gradients maintain $D \approx 1$ regardless of graph topology, while real training exhibits dimensional excess from backpropagation correlations. The grokking-localized $D(t)$ crossing -- robust across topologies -- offers new insight into the trainability of overparameterized networks.

</details>


### [379] [Anticipatory Reinforcement Learning: From Generative Path-Laws to Distributional Value Functions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04662)
*Daniel Bloch*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: ARL框架通过签名增强流形将状态空间提升，在单轨迹观测约束下解决非马尔可夫决策过程问题，实现确定性预期回报评估，显著降低计算复杂度和方差。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统基于状态的方法在跳跃扩散和结构性断点环境中无法捕捉路径依赖几何特征，需要解决非马尔可夫决策过程与经典强化学习架构之间的差距。

Method: 将状态空间提升到签名增强流形，将过程历史嵌入为动态坐标；采用自洽场方法维护未来路径律的预期代理，实现确定性预期回报评估。

Result: 框架保持基本收缩性质，在重尾噪声下确保稳定泛化；通过将强化学习建立在路径空间拓扑特征上，实现主动风险管理和优越的策略稳定性。

Conclusion: ARL框架通过路径空间拓扑特征将强化学习基础化，在高度波动的连续时间环境中实现主动风险管理和优越的策略稳定性。

Abstract: This paper introduces Anticipatory Reinforcement Learning (ARL), a novel framework designed to bridge the gap between non-Markovian decision processes and classical reinforcement learning architectures, specifically under the constraint of a single observed trajectory. In environments characterised by jump-diffusions and structural breaks, traditional state-based methods often fail to capture the essential path-dependent geometry required for accurate foresight. We resolve this by lifting the state space into a signature-augmented manifold, where the history of the process is embedded as a dynamical coordinate. By utilising a self-consistent field approach, the agent maintains an anticipated proxy of the future path-law, allowing for a deterministic evaluation of expected returns. This transition from stochastic branching to a single-pass linear evaluation significantly reduces computational complexity and variance. We prove that this framework preserves fundamental contraction properties and ensures stable generalisation even in the presence of heavy-tailed noise. Our results demonstrate that by grounding reinforcement learning in the topological features of path-space, agents can achieve proactive risk management and superior policy stability in highly volatile, continuous-time environments.

</details>


### [380] [Batch Loss Score for Dynamic Data Pruning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04681)
*Qing Zhou,Bingxuan Zhao,Tao Yang,Hongyuan Zhang,Junyu Gao,Qi Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: BLS是一种通过指数移动平均批量损失来评估样本重要性的高效方法，无需计算逐样本损失，仅需三行代码即可集成，能无损剪枝20%-50%的训练样本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有动态数据剪枝方法通常依赖逐样本损失作为重要性指标，但对于复杂模型或损失函数，获取逐样本损失可能困难或不可行，需要大量实现工作。需要一种更简单高效的方法来评估样本重要性。

Method: 提出批量损失分数（BLS），使用批量损失的指数移动平均（EMA）为单个样本分配分数。将批量损失视为单个样本损失的带噪声测量，噪声来自随机批量组合。EMA机制作为一阶低通滤波器，衰减高频批量组合噪声，得到近似样本平滑持久贡献的分数。

Result: BLS展示了卓越的代码集成简单性（仅需三行代码注入），并能轻松适配现有的逐样本损失方法（一行代理）。在14个数据集、11个任务和18个模型上，成功无损剪枝20%-50%的样本。

Conclusion: BLS提供了一种理论基础的样本重要性代理方法，特别适用于逐样本损失难以获取的复杂场景，具有广泛的实用性和适用性。

Abstract: Dynamic data pruning accelerates deep learning by selectively omitting less informative samples during training. While per-sample loss is a common importance metric, obtaining it can be challenging or infeasible for complex models or loss functions, often requiring significant implementation effort. This work proposes the Batch Loss Score (BLS), a computationally efficient alternative using an Exponential Moving Average (EMA) of readily available batch losses to assign scores to individual samples. We frame the batch loss, from the perspective of a single sample, as a noisy measurement of its scaled individual loss, with noise originating from stochastic batch composition. It is formally shown that the EMA mechanism functions as a first-order low-pass filter, attenuating high-frequency batch composition noise. This yields a score approximating the smoothed and persistent contribution of the individual sample to the loss, providing a theoretical grounding for BLS as a proxy for sample importance. BLS demonstrates remarkable code integration simplicity (\textbf{three-line injection}) and readily adapts existing per-sample loss-based methods (\textbf{one-line proxy}). Its effectiveness is demonstrated by enhancing two such methods to losslessly prune \textbf{20\%-50\%} of samples across \textit{14 datasets}, \textit{11 tasks} and \textit{18 models}, highlighting its utility and broad applicability, especially for complex scenarios where per-sample loss is difficult to access. Code is available at https://github.com/mrazhou/BLS.

</details>


### [381] [Explainable Machine Learning for Sepsis Outcome Prediction Using a Novel Romanian Electronic Health Record Dataset](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04698)
*Andrei-Alexandru Bunea,Ovidiu Ghibea,Dan-Matei Popovici,Ion Daniel,Octavian Andronic*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 开发可解释的机器学习模型用于脓毒症预后预测，使用罗马尼亚大型急诊医院的12,286例住院数据，在三个分类任务中实现优异性能，并通过SHAP分析识别关键临床预测因子。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 开发可解释的机器学习模型来预测脓毒症预后，旨在识别临床强预测因子，同时在不同分类任务中实现最先进的结果，为临床决策提供支持。

Method: 使用包含人口统计学、ICD-10诊断和600种实验室测试的EHR数据集，训练五种ML模型。实验探索了特征丰富度与患者覆盖范围之间的权衡，使用10-50个最常见实验室测试的子集。使用准确率和AUC评估性能，使用SHAP评估可解释性。

Result: 在"死亡vs康复"案例研究中获得最高性能（AUC=0.983，准确率=0.93）。SHAP分析识别出心血管合并症、尿素水平、天冬氨酸氨基转移酶、血小板计数和嗜酸性粒细胞百分比等强预测因子。嗜酸性粒细胞减少症成为顶级预测因子，突显其作为未被充分利用的标记物的价值。

Conclusion: 该研究开发了高性能且可解释的脓毒症预后预测模型，识别了包括嗜酸性粒细胞减少症在内的关键临床预测因子，这些模型在临床环境中具有应用潜力，特别是嗜酸性粒细胞减少症这一未被当前评估标准纳入的标记物值得关注。

Abstract: We develop and analyze explainable machine learning (ML) models for sepsis outcome prediction using a novel Electronic Health Record (EHR) dataset from 12,286 hospitalizations at a large emergency hospital in Romania. The dataset includes demographics, International Classification of Diseases (ICD-10) diagnostics, and 600 types of laboratory tests. This study aims to identify clinically strong predictors while achieving state-of-the-art results across three classification tasks: (1)deceased vs. discharged, (2)deceased vs. recovered, and (3)recovered vs. ameliorated. We trained five ML models to capture complex distributions while preserving clinical interpretability. Experiments explored the trade-off between feature richness and patient coverage, using subsets of the 10--50 most frequent laboratory tests. Model performance was evaluated using accuracy and area under the curve (AUC), and explainability was assessed using SHapley Additive exPlanations (SHAP). The highest performance was obtained for the deceased vs. recovered case study (AUC=0.983, accuracy=0.93). SHAP analysis identified several strong predictors such as cardiovascular comorbidities, urea levels, aspartate aminotransferase, platelet count, and eosinophil percentage. Eosinopenia emerged as a top predictor, highlighting its value as an underutilized marker that is not included in current assessment standards, while the high performance suggests the applicability of these models in clinical settings.

</details>


### [382] [MUXQ: Mixed-to-Uniform Precision MatriX Quantization via Low-Rank Outlier Decomposition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04701)
*Seoungsub Lee,In Seo Kim,Seon Wook Kim*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: MUXQ是一种混合到均匀量化方法，通过检测输入激活中的异常通道并引入辅助矩阵重新分配异常值，实现低精度INT量化，在NPU设备上实现高效准确的LLM推理。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大型语言模型参数庞大导致内存和计算开销大，在NPU设备上FP16/FP32计算效率低，需要整数量化。现有量化方法如ZeroQuant、LLM.int8()和SmoothQuant未能完全解决输入激活异常值问题及其相关的硬件效率低下问题。

Method: 提出MUXQ（混合到均匀量化）方法：检测输入激活中的异常通道，引入小型辅助矩阵重新分配异常值幅度，缓解异常值问题，使异常激活也能在低精度INT级别量化，同时保持硬件友好的计算结构。

Result: 在三个规模的GPT-2模型（0.1B、0.3B、0.7B参数）上使用WikiText-2数据集进行实验，MUXQ始终比朴素量化获得更低的困惑度。在每张量量化下，MUXQ将激活和权重量化为INT8，同时保持接近FP16的精度。

Conclusion: MUXQ以适度的计算开销实现稳定的低精度推理，可与其他量化技术结合，为边缘设备上高效准确的LLM推理提供了有前景的方向。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have achieved outstanding performance across a wide range of natural language processing tasks, but their enormous parameter counts impose ubstantial memory and computational overheads. This challenge is particularly critical in NPU-based on-device environments, where FP16/FP32 computation is inefficient and integer (INT) quantization is therefore essential. However, existing methods, including ZeroQuant, LLM.int8(), and SmoothQuant, do not fully address input-activation outliers and the associated hardware inefficiencies. To overcome these limitations, we propose MUXQ (Mixed-to-Uniform Quantization). MUXQ detects outlier channels in input activations and introduces a small auxiliary matrix that redistributes outlier magnitudes across channels, thereby alleviating the outlier problem. This enables even activation outliers to be quantized at low-precision INT levels while preserving a hardware-friendly computation structure. Experiments on GPT-2 models at three scales (0.1B, 0.3B, and 0.7B parameters) using the WikiText-2 dataset show that MUXQ consistently achieves lower perplexity than naive quantization. In particular, under per-tensor quantization, MUXQ quantizes both activations and weights to INT8 while maintaining accuracy close to that of FP16. With only modest computational overhead, MUXQ enables stable low-precision inference and can be readily combined with other quantization techniques. These results suggest that MUXQ provides a promising direction for efficient and accurate LLM inference on edge devices.

</details>


### [383] [The Infinite-Dimensional Nature of Spectroscopy and Why Models Succeed, Fail, and Mislead](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04717)
*Umberto Michelucci,Francesca Venturini*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 论文揭示了光谱数据高维特性导致机器学习模型即使在没有化学区分特征时也能达到近乎完美准确度的现象，并提供了理论框架和实践建议。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器学习模型在光谱分类任务中取得了惊人的高准确度，但缺乏明确证据表明这些模型使用了化学上有意义的特征。现有研究将这些结果与数据预处理选择、噪声敏感性和模型复杂性联系起来，但缺乏统一的解释。

Method: 基于Feldman-Hajek定理和测度集中理论进行理论分析，通过合成和真实荧光光谱的一系列具体实验，展示模型如何在缺乏化学区分时仍能达到近乎完美的准确度。

Result: 研究表明，光谱数据固有的高维特性使得即使由噪声、归一化或仪器伪影引起的微小分布差异，在高维空间中也可能变得完全可分离。模型可以在没有化学区分的情况下实现近乎完美的准确度，特征重要性图可能突出光谱无关区域。

Conclusion: 为光谱学中构建和解释机器学习模型提供了严格的理论框架，并通过实验证实了该效应，最后给出了实用的建议。

Abstract: Machine learning (ML) models have achieved strikingly high accuracies in spectroscopic classification tasks, often without a clear proof that those models used chemically meaningful features. Existing studies have linked these results to data preprocessing choices, noise sensitivity, and model complexity, but no unifying explanation is available so far. In this work, we show that these phenomena arise naturally from the intrinsic high dimensionality of spectral data. Using a theoretical analysis grounded in the Feldman-Hajek theorem and the concentration of measure, we show that even infinitesimal distributional differences, caused by noise, normalisation, or instrumental artefacts, may become perfectly separable in high-dimensional spaces. Through a series of specific experiments on synthetic and real fluorescence spectra, we illustrate how models can achieve near-perfect accuracy even when chemical distinctions are absent, and why feature-importance maps may highlight spectrally irrelevant regions. We provide a rigorous theoretical framework, confirm the effect experimentally, and conclude with practical recommendations for building and interpreting ML models in spectroscopy.

</details>


### [384] [Sampling Parallelism for Fast and Efficient Bayesian Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04736)
*Asena Karolin Özdemir,Lars H. Heyen,Arvid Weyrauch,Achim Streit,Markus Götz,Charlotte Debus*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出采样并行化策略，通过在多GPU上分布样本评估来加速贝叶斯神经网络训练，减少内存压力和训练时间，同时增加数据增强多样性


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 贝叶斯神经网络等基于采样的贝叶斯学习方法计算成本高，内存消耗大，限制了其在风险敏感领域的应用。现有不确定性量化方法难以部署，需要更高效的并行化策略

Method: 提出采样并行化策略，将贝叶斯学习中的样本评估分布到多个GPU上。该方法针对采样瓶颈，无需架构更改或大量超参数调优。还实现了与数据并行化的混合方法

Result: 实验显示采样并行化在样本数量与计算资源成比例缩放时接近完美扩展。虽然数据并行化在恒定工作负载下获得更好的原始加速，但采样并行化通过在每个GPU上对同一批次应用独立随机增强，增加了增强多样性，减少了收敛所需epoch数

Conclusion: 采样并行化是解决贝叶斯学习方法计算瓶颈的有效策略，与现有并行化方法互补，能够提高训练效率并增加数据增强多样性，促进贝叶斯技术在不确定性量化领域的应用

Abstract: Machine learning models, and deep neural networks in particular, are increasingly deployed in risk-sensitive domains such as healthcare, environmental forecasting, and finance, where reliable quantification of predictive uncertainty is essential. However, many uncertainty quantification (UQ) methods remain difficult to apply due to their substantial computational cost. Sampling-based Bayesian learning approaches, such as Bayesian neural networks (BNNs), are particularly expensive since drawing and evaluating multiple parameter samples rapidly exhausts memory and compute resources. These constraints have limited the accessibility and exploration of Bayesian techniques thus far. To address these challenges, we introduce sampling parallelism, a simple yet powerful parallelization strategy that targets the primary bottleneck of sampling-based Bayesian learning: the samples themselves. By distributing sample evaluations across multiple GPUs, our method reduces memory pressure and training time without requiring architectural changes or extensive hyperparameter tuning. We detail the methodology and evaluate its performance on a few example tasks and architectures, comparing against distributed data parallelism (DDP) as a baseline. We further demonstrate that sampling parallelism is complementary to existing strategies by implementing a hybrid approach that combines sample and data parallelism. Our experiments show near-perfect scaling when the sample number is scaled proportionally to the computational resources, confirming that sample evaluations parallelize cleanly. Although DDP achieves better raw speedups under scaling with constant workload, sampling parallelism has a notable advantage: by applying independent stochastic augmentations to the same batch on each GPU, it increases augmentation diversity and thus reduces the number of epochs required for convergence.

</details>


### [385] [Darkness Visible: Reading the Exception Handler of a Language Model](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04756)
*Peter Balogh*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: GPT-2 Small最后一层MLP展现清晰的路由程序结构，包含27个命名神经元组成的三层异常处理器，而知识则分布在约3040个残差神经元中。研究发现知识神经元主要作为路由基础设施而非事实存储。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索GPT-2 Small模型中知识表示和路由的机制，理解MLP层如何组织和处理信息，特别是知识神经元在事实存储与信号路由中的实际功能。

Method: 将3072个神经元分解为5类：5个融合核心神经元、10个区分器、5个专家、7个共识神经元。通过三个实验分析知识神经元功能，包括MLP干预实验、上下文约束缩放实验和花园路径实验。

Result: 发现MLP主要作为路由基础设施，放大或抑制注意力机制产生的信号。共识-异常交叉点在统计上显著（4/7到5/7之间）。花园路径实验显示GPT-2立即使用动词次范畴化信息，异常处理器基于词汇级可预测性而非句法结构运作。

Conclusion: GPT-2 Small的最终MLP层形成了清晰的路由架构，知识神经元主要作为路由基础设施而非事实存储。这种架构仅在最终层结晶化，在更深层模型中类似结构应出现在最终层而非中间层。

Abstract: The final MLP of GPT-2 Small exhibits a fully legible routing program -- 27 named neurons organized into a three-tier exception handler -- while the knowledge it routes remains entangled across ~3,040 residual neurons. We decompose all 3,072 neurons (to numerical precision) into: 5 fused Core neurons that reset vocabulary toward function words, 10 Differentiators that suppress wrong candidates, 5 Specialists that detect structural boundaries, and 7 Consensus neurons that each monitor a distinct linguistic dimension. The consensus-exception crossover -- where MLP intervention shifts from helpful to harmful -- is statistically sharp (bootstrap 95% CIs exclude zero at all consensus levels; crossover between 4/7 and 5/7). Three experiments show that "knowledge neurons" (Dai et al., 2022), at L11 of this model, function as routing infrastructure rather than fact storage: the MLP amplifies or suppresses signals already present in the residual stream from attention, scaling with contextual constraint. A garden-path experiment reveals a reversed garden-path effect -- GPT-2 uses verb subcategorization immediately, consistent with the exception handler operating at token-level predictability rather than syntactic structure. This architecture crystallizes only at the terminal layer -- in deeper models, we predict equivalent structure at the final layer, not at layer 11. Code and data: https://github.com/pbalogh/transparent-gpt2

</details>


### [386] [Cog-DRIFT: Exploration on Adaptively Reformulated Instances Enables Learning from Hard Reasoning Problems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04767)
*Justin Chih-Yao Chen,Archiki Prasad,Zaid Khan,Joykirat Singh,Runchu Tian,Elias Stengel-Eskin,Mohit Bansal*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出Cog-DRIFT框架，通过任务重构将困难开放性问题转化为更简单的认知格式（如选择题、完形填空），构建自适应课程学习，解决RLVR中模型无法从当前策略下无法解决的问题中学习的限制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: RLVR虽然提升了LLM的推理能力，但存在根本限制：模型无法从当前策略下无法解决的困难问题中学习，因为这些问题无法提供有意义的奖励信号。

Method: 提出Cog-DRIFT框架：1) 将困难开放性问题重构为认知上更简单的变体（如选择题、完形填空），保留原答案但减少搜索空间并提供更密集的学习信号；2) 构建从判别式到生成式任务的谱系；3) 组织成基于难度的自适应课程，从简单格式逐步过渡到困难格式。

Result: 在2个模型和6个推理基准测试中，Cog-DRIFT始终优于标准GRPO和强引导探索基线。对原本无法解决的困难问题，Qwen绝对提升+10.11%，Llama提升+8.64%。平均改进：Qwen +4.72%，Llama +3.23%。同时改善了测试时的pass@k和样本效率。

Conclusion: 任务重构和课程学习是克服LLM后训练中探索障碍的有效范式，使模型能够从原本无法提供信号的问题中学习，显著提升推理性能。

Abstract: Reinforcement learning from verifiable rewards (RLVR) has improved the reasoning abilities of LLMs, yet a fundamental limitation remains: models cannot learn from problems that are too difficult to solve under their current policy, as these yield no meaningful reward signal. We propose a simple yet effective solution based on task reformulation. We transform challenging open-ended problems into cognitively simpler variants -- such as multiple-choice and cloze formats -- that preserve the original answer while reducing the effective search space and providing denser learning signals. These reformulations span a spectrum from discriminative to generative tasks, which we exploit to bootstrap learning: models first learn from structured, easier formats, and this knowledge transfers back to improve performance on the original open-ended problems. Building on this insight, we introduce Cog-DRIFT, a framework that constructs reformulated variants and organizes them into an adaptive curriculum based on difficulty. Training progresses from easier to harder formats, enabling the model to learn from problems that previously yielded zero signal under standard RL post-training. Cog-DRIFT not only improves on the originally unsolvable hard problems (absolute +10.11% for Qwen and +8.64% for Llama) but also generalizes well to other held-out datasets. Across 2 models and 6 reasoning benchmarks, our method consistently outperforms standard GRPO and strong guided-exploration baselines. On average, Cog-DRIFT shows +4.72% (Qwen) and +3.23% (Llama) improvements over the second-best baseline. We further show that Cog-DRIFT improves pass@k at test time, and the curriculum improves sample efficiency. Overall, our results highlight task reformulation and curriculum learning as an effective paradigm for overcoming the exploration barrier in LLM post-training.

</details>


### [387] [Forgetting to Witness: Efficient Federated Unlearning and Its Visible Evaluation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04800)
*Houzhe Wang,Xiaojie Zhu,Chi Chen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了首个完整的联邦遗忘学习流程，包括高效的联邦遗忘方法和名为Skyeye的可视化评估框架，用于确保模型在删除特定数据后不再保留相关信息。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着数据隐私和安全的重要性日益增加，联邦遗忘学习成为一个新兴研究领域，旨在确保联邦学习模型在特定数据被删除后不再保留或泄露相关信息。目前缺乏完整的联邦遗忘学习流程和评估方法。

Method: 提出完整的联邦遗忘学习流程：1）高效的联邦遗忘方法，利用知识蒸馏模型和优化机制，无需存储历史数据；2）Skyeye评估框架，将联邦遗忘模型作为分类器集成到GAN中，通过生成器可视化模型知识，基于生成样本与删除数据的相关性评估遗忘能力。

Result: 通过全面的实验验证了所提出的联邦遗忘方法和评估框架的有效性。该方法在保证高效性和模型准确性的同时，实现了有效的遗忘效果。

Conclusion: 本文提出了首个完整的联邦遗忘学习解决方案，包括高效的遗忘方法和创新的可视化评估框架，为联邦学习中的数据隐私保护提供了重要技术支撑。

Abstract: With the increasing importance of data privacy and security, federated unlearning has emerged as a novel research field dedicated to ensuring that federated learning models no longer retain or leak relevant information once specific data has been deleted. In this paper, to the best of our knowledge, we propose the first complete pipeline for federated unlearning, which includes a federated unlearning approach and an evaluation framework. Our proposed federated unlearning approach ensures high efficiency and model accuracy without the need to store historical data.It effectively leverages the knowledge distillation model alongside various optimization mechanisms. Moreover, we propose a framework named Skyeye to visualize the forgetting capacity of federated unlearning models. It utilizes the federated unlearning model as the classifier integrated into a Generative Adversarial Network (GAN). Afterward, both the classifier and discriminator guide the generator in generating samples. Throughout this process, the generator learns from the classifier's knowledge. The generator then visualizes this knowledge through sample generation. Finally, the model's forgetting capability is evaluated based on the relevance between the deleted data and the generated samples. Comprehensive experiments are conducted to illustrate the effectiveness of the proposed federated unlearning approach and the corresponding evaluation framework.

</details>


### [388] [Selecting Decision-Relevant Concepts in Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04808)
*Naveen Raman,Stephanie Milani,Fei Fang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出首个用于序列决策中自动概念选择的算法DRS，通过状态抽象视角选择决策相关概念，无需人工干预即可获得性能保证


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统基于概念的策略训练需要人工选择可理解的概念，这需要领域专业知识、耗时耗力、难以扩展，且无法提供性能保证

Method: 将概念选择视为状态抽象问题：决策相关的概念是那些如果移除会导致智能体混淆需要不同动作的状态。提出决策相关选择(DRS)算法，从候选概念集中选择子集

Result: DRS能够自动恢复人工筛选的概念集，匹配或超越其性能，并在强化学习基准和真实医疗环境中提高了测试时概念干预的有效性

Conclusion: 通过状态抽象视角进行概念选择是有效的，DRS算法为自动选择决策相关概念提供了理论基础和性能保证，解决了人工概念选择的局限性

Abstract: Training interpretable concept-based policies requires practitioners to manually select which human-understandable concepts an agent should reason with when making sequential decisions. This selection demands domain expertise, is time-consuming and costly, scales poorly with the number of candidates, and provides no performance guarantees. To overcome this limitation, we propose the first algorithms for principled automatic concept selection in sequential decision-making. Our key insight is that concept selection can be viewed through the lens of state abstraction: intuitively, a concept is decision-relevant if removing it would cause the agent to confuse states that require different actions. As a result, agents should rely on decision-relevant concepts; states with the same concept representation should share the same optimal action, which preserves the optimal decision structure of the original state space. This perspective leads to the Decision-Relevant Selection (DRS) algorithm, which selects a subset of concepts from a candidate set, along with performance bounds relating the selected concepts to the performance of the resulting policy. Empirically, DRS automatically recovers manually curated concept sets while matching or exceeding their performance, and improves the effectiveness of test-time concept interventions across reinforcement learning benchmarks and real-world healthcare environments.

</details>


### [389] [The Role of Generator Access in Autoregressive Post-Training](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04855)
*Amit Kiran Rege*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究生成器访问方式如何约束自回归后训练，发现根起始采样与弱前缀控制之间存在指数级性能差距


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究自回归后训练中生成器访问方式的约束作用，探索学习者是否只能进行新鲜根起始采样，还是可以返回先前构建的前缀并查询下一个标记规则

Method: 比较两种生成器访问范式：根起始采样（只能从根节点开始新轨迹）和弱前缀控制（可以返回任意前缀位置查询）。分析不同观察类型（输出采样、对数概率、top-k报告、完整下一个标记分布）的等价性

Result: 在根起始机制下，所有观察类型都归结为一种规范实验，受限于到达信息前缀的在线概率。弱前缀控制打破这一障碍，一旦获得控制，条件采样或logits等更丰富的观察可以超越top-1访问。仅改变生成器接口就会为KL正则化结果奖励后训练创建指数级差距

Conclusion: 生成器访问方式对自回归后训练有根本性影响，弱前缀控制相比根起始采样能提供指数级优势，这为后训练算法设计提供了重要启示

Abstract: We study how generator access constrains autoregressive post-training. The central question is whether the learner is confined to fresh root-start rollouts or can return to previously built prefixes and query the next-token rule there. In the root-start regime, output sampling, generated-token log probabilities, top-$k$ reports, and full next-token distributions along sampled trajectories all reduce to one canonical experiment, limited by the on-policy probability of reaching informative prefixes. Weak prefix control breaks this barrier, and once control is available, richer observations such as conditional sampling or logits can outperform top-$1$ access. Changing only the generator interface creates an exponential gap for KL-regularized outcome-reward post-training.

</details>


### [390] [FairLogue: A Toolkit for Intersectional Fairness Analysis in Clinical Machine Learning Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04858)
*Nick Souligne,Vignesh Subbian*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: Fairlogue是一个用于医疗机器学习中交叉公平性评估的Python工具包，包含观测、反事实和广义反事实三个框架，在青光眼手术预测任务中验证了交叉分析比单轴分析能发现更大的公平性差距。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前大多数公平性工具强调单轴人口统计比较，可能错过影响交叉人群的复合差异。医疗领域需要能够评估交叉公平性的工具来确保公平和可信的机器学习。

Method: Fairlogue包含三个组件：1) 将人口均等、均衡机会和机会均等差异扩展到交叉人群的观测框架；2) 评估治疗背景下公平性的反事实框架；3) 评估交叉群体成员干预下公平性的广义反事实框架。使用All of Us数据集在青光眼手术预测任务中评估，以种族和性别为保护属性。

Result: 观测分析发现尽管模型性能中等（AUROC=0.709；准确率=0.651），但存在显著的交叉差异。交叉评估显示比单轴分析更大的公平性差距，包括人口均等差异0.20，均衡机会真阳性率和假阳性率差距分别为0.33和0.15。反事实分析显示观察到的差异在协变量条件下与随机机会一致。

Conclusion: Fairlogue提供了一个模块化工具包，整合了观测和反事实方法，用于量化和评估临床机器学习工作流程中的交叉偏见。

Abstract: Objective: Algorithmic fairness is essential for equitable and trustworthy machine learning in healthcare. Most fairness tools emphasize single-axis demographic comparisons and may miss compounded disparities affecting intersectional populations. This study introduces Fairlogue, a toolkit designed to operationalize intersectional fairness assessment in observational and counterfactual contexts within clinical settings. Methods: Fairlogue is a Python-based toolkit composed of three components: 1) an observational framework extending demographic parity, equalized odds, and equal opportunity difference to intersectional populations; 2) a counterfactual framework evaluating fairness under treatment-based contexts; and 3) a generalized counterfactual framework assessing fairness under interventions on intersectional group membership. The toolkit was evaluated using electronic health record data from the All of Us Controlled Tier V8 dataset in a glaucoma surgery prediction task using logistic regression with race and gender as protected attributes. Results: Observational analysis identified substantial intersectional disparities despite moderate model performance (AUROC = 0.709; accuracy = 0.651). Intersectional evaluation revealed larger fairness gaps than single-axis analyses, including demographic parity differences of 0.20 and equalized odds true positive and false positive rate gaps of 0.33 and 0.15, respectively. Counterfactual analysis using permutation-based null distributions produced unfairness ("u-value") estimates near zero, suggesting observed disparities were consistent with chance after conditioning on covariates. Conclusion: Fairlogue provides a modular toolkit integrating observational and counterfactual methods for quantifying and evaluating intersectional bias in clinical machine learning workflows.

</details>


### [391] [Noise Immunity in In-Context Tabular Learning: An Empirical Robustness Analysis of TabPFN's Attention Mechanisms](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04868)
*James Hu,Mahdi Ghelichi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: TabPFN作为表格基础模型，在数据质量不佳（无关特征、相关特征组、标签噪声）的情况下表现出高度鲁棒性，保持高预测性能和有结构的注意力机制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 工业领域（金融、医疗）中表格预测普遍存在，但为每个新表格重新训练定制模型成本高或不可行，且数据质量问题（无关预测变量、相关特征组、标签噪声）常见。需要研究表格基础模型在这些次优条件下的鲁棒性。

Method: 通过受控合成扰动研究TabPFN及其注意力机制：1）数据集宽度：注入随机不相关特征和非线性相关特征；2）数据集大小：增加训练行数；3）标签质量：增加错误标签比例。分析内部信号包括注意力集中度和基于注意力的特征排序指标。

Result: TabPFN表现出显著韧性：ROC-AUC保持高位，注意力保持结构化和锐利，信息特征通过注意力指标排名高。注意力热图、特征-令牌嵌入和SHAP图显示TabPFN在各层中逐渐集中于有用特征，并将信号与噪声分离。

Conclusion: TabPFN是一个鲁棒的表格基础模型，能够在各种数据缺陷场景下保持预测性能和一致的内部行为，适合工业应用中的表格预测任务。

Abstract: Tabular foundation models (TFMs) such as TabPFN (Tabular Prior-Data Fitted Network) are designed to generalize across heterogeneous tabular datasets through in-context learning (ICL). They perform prediction in a single forward pass conditioned on labeled examples without dataset-specific parameter updates. This paradigm is particularly attractive in industrial domains (e.g., finance and healthcare) where tabular prediction is pervasive. Retraining a bespoke model for each new table can be costly or infeasible in these settings, while data quality issues such as irrelevant predictors, correlated feature groups, and label noise are common. In this paper, we provide strong empirical evidence that TabPFN is highly robust under these sub-optimal conditions. We study TabPFN and its attention mechanisms for binary classification problems with controlled synthetic perturbations that vary: (i) dataset width by injecting random uncorrelated features and by introducing nonlinearly correlated features, (ii) dataset size by increasing the number of training rows, and (iii) label quality by increasing the fraction of mislabeled targets. Beyond predictive performance, we analyze internal signals including attention concentration and attention-based feature ranking metrics. Across these parametric tests, TabPFN is remarkably resilient: ROC-AUC remains high, attention stays structured and sharp, and informative features are highly ranked by attention-based metrics. Qualitative visualizations with attention heatmaps, feature-token embeddings, and SHAP plots further support a consistent pattern across layers in which TabPFN increasingly concentrates on useful features while separating their signals from noise. Together, these findings suggest that TabPFN is a robust TFM capable of maintaining both predictive performance and coherent internal behavior under various scenarios of data imperfections.

</details>


### [392] [Optimizing LLM Prompt Engineering with DSPy Based Declarative Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04869)
*Shiek Ruksana,Sailesh Kiran Kurra,Thipparthi Sanjay Baradwaj*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: DSPy框架通过声明式学习自动优化LLM提示，提高事实准确性30-45%，减少幻觉率25%


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统提示工程依赖启发式试错，缺乏可扩展性、可重复性和跨任务泛化能力，需要更系统化的优化方法

Method: 提出统一DSPy LLM架构，结合符号规划、无梯度优化和自动模块重写，实现声明式提示优化框架

Result: 在推理任务、检索增强生成和多步思维链基准测试中，输出可靠性、效率和泛化能力均有提升，事实准确性提高30-45%，幻觉率降低约25%

Conclusion: DSPy声明式学习框架能有效优化LLM提示，但仍有局限性，需要未来研究进一步完善

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have shown strong performance across a wide range of natural language processing tasks; however, their effectiveness is highly dependent on prompt design, structure, and embedded reasoning signals. Conventional prompt engineering methods largely rely on heuristic trial-and-error processes, which limits scalability, reproducibility, and generalization across tasks. DSPy, a declarative framework for optimizing text-processing pipelines, offers an alternative approach by enabling automated, modular, and learnable prompt construction for LLM-based systems.This paper presents a systematic study of DSPy-based declarative learning for prompt optimization, with emphasis on prompt synthesis, correction, calibration, and adaptive reasoning control. We introduce a unified DSPy LLM architecture that combines symbolic planning, gradient free optimization, and automated module rewriting to reduce hallucinations, improve factual grounding, and avoid unnecessary prompt complexity. Experimental evaluations conducted on reasoning tasks, retrieval-augmented generation, and multi-step chain-of-thought benchmarks demonstrate consistent gains in output reliability, efficiency, and generalization across models. The results show improvements of up to 30 to 45% in factual accuracy and a reduction of approximately 25% in hallucination rates. Finally, we outline key limitations and discuss future research directions for declarative prompt optimization frameworks.

</details>


### [393] [Data Attribution in Adaptive Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04892)
*Amit Kiran Rege*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 论文提出了一种针对自适应学习场景的发生级归因方法，解决了传统静态数据集归因方法无法处理数据反馈循环的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器学习模型越来越多地生成自己的训练数据（如在线赌博机、强化学习、语言模型后训练管道）。在这些自适应设置中，单个训练观测既更新学习器，又改变学习器未来收集数据的分布。传统的归因方法设计用于静态数据集，忽略了这种反馈循环。

Method: 通过条件干预目标形式化有限时域自适应学习中的发生级归因，证明回放侧信息通常无法恢复该目标，并识别出一个可以从记录数据中识别目标的结构类别。

Result: 建立了自适应学习归因的理论框架，确定了在何种条件下可以从记录数据中识别归因目标，并指出了回放侧信息的局限性。

Conclusion: 需要专门针对自适应学习场景的归因方法，论文提出的框架为解决这类问题提供了理论基础，并指出了未来研究的方向。

Abstract: Machine learning models increasingly generate their own training data -- online bandits, reinforcement learning, and post-training pipelines for language models are leading examples. In these adaptive settings, a single training observation both updates the learner and shifts the distribution of future data the learner will collect. Standard attribution methods, designed for static datasets, ignore this feedback. We formalize occurrence-level attribution for finite-horizon adaptive learning via a conditional interventional target, prove that replay-side information cannot recover it in general, and identify a structural class in which the target is identified from logged data.

</details>


### [394] [Are Latent Reasoning Models Easily Interpretable?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04902)
*Connor Dilgren,Sarah Wiegreffe*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: LRMs虽然推理成本低，但可解释性差。研究发现：1）LRMs的潜在推理token常非必要；2）当这些token必要时，可解码出65-93%的正确推理轨迹；3）提出无需先验知识解码验证推理轨迹的方法，发现正确预测多数有可验证轨迹，错误预测则很少。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LRMs（潜在推理模型）因推理成本低且能并行探索多推理路径而受关注，但牺牲了可解释性。本文旨在研究LRMs的可解释性问题，探究其潜在推理token的实际作用和解码可能性。

Method: 研究两个最先进的LRMs：1）分析潜在推理token对预测的必要性；2）当token必要时，尝试解码黄金推理轨迹；3）提出无需先验知识解码验证自然语言推理轨迹的方法。

Result: 1）在逻辑推理数据集上，LRMs几乎总能在不使用潜在推理token的情况下得出相同答案；2）当token必要时，可解码出65-93%的正确推理轨迹；3）提出的解码方法能为多数正确预测找到验证轨迹，但仅少数错误预测有验证轨迹。

Conclusion: 当前LRMs主要编码可解释的推理过程，可解释性本身可作为预测正确性的信号。研究揭示了LRMs潜在推理token的实际利用不足，并展示了从潜在token解码可验证推理轨迹的可行性。

Abstract: Latent reasoning models (LRMs) have attracted significant research interest due to their low inference cost (relative to explicit reasoning models) and theoretical ability to explore multiple reasoning paths in parallel. However, these benefits come at the cost of reduced interpretability: LRMs are difficult to monitor because they do not reason in natural language. This paper presents an investigation into LRM interpretability by examining two state-of-the-art LRMs. First, we find that latent reasoning tokens are often unnecessary for LRMs' predictions; on logical reasoning datasets, LRMs can almost always produce the same final answers without using latent reasoning at all. This underutilization of reasoning tokens may partially explain why LRMs do not consistently outperform explicit reasoning methods and raises doubts about the stated role of these tokens in prior work. Second, we demonstrate that when latent reasoning tokens are necessary for performance, we can decode gold reasoning traces up to 65-93% of the time for correctly predicted instances. This suggests LRMs often implement the expected solution rather than an uninterpretable reasoning process. Finally, we present a method to decode a verified natural language reasoning trace from latent tokens without knowing a gold reasoning trace a priori, demonstrating that it is possible to find a verified trace for a majority of correct predictions but only a minority of incorrect predictions. Our findings highlight that current LRMs largely encode interpretable processes, and interpretability itself can be a signal of prediction correctness.

</details>


### [395] [HI-MoE: Hierarchical Instance-Conditioned Mixture-of-Experts for Object Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04908)
*Vadim Vashkelis,Natalia Trukhina*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: HI-MoE是一种用于目标检测的DETR风格架构，采用两阶段路由机制：场景路由器选择场景一致的专家子集，实例路由器为每个目标查询分配少量专家，在保持稀疏计算的同时更好地匹配检测任务的实例中心特性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的视觉MoE方法主要在图像或补丁级别操作，这与目标检测的基本推理单元（目标查询）不匹配。需要一种更适合目标检测任务的稀疏路由方法，能够处理检测中异构的、以实例为中心的结构。

Method: 提出分层实例条件混合专家（HI-MoE）：1）轻量级场景路由器选择场景一致的专家子集；2）实例路由器为每个目标查询在子集中分配少量专家。这种两阶段路由设计旨在保持稀疏计算的同时更好地匹配检测任务特性。

Result: 在COCO数据集上的实验显示，HI-MoE优于密集DINO基线和简单的token级别或仅实例路由变体，在小目标检测上表现尤其突出。在LVIS上的初步专业化分析也显示了专家专业化模式。

Conclusion: HI-MoE为目标检测提供了一种有效的稀疏路由方法，通过分层路由机制更好地匹配检测任务的实例中心特性，在保持计算效率的同时提高了检测性能，特别是在小目标检测方面。

Abstract: Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architectures enable conditional computation by activating only a subset of model parameters for each input. Although sparse routing has been highly effective in language models and has also shown promise in vision, most vision MoE methods operate at the image or patch level. This granularity is poorly aligned with object detection, where the fundamental unit of reasoning is an object query corresponding to a candidate instance. We propose Hierarchical Instance-Conditioned Mixture-of-Experts (HI-MoE), a DETR-style detection architecture that performs routing in two stages: a lightweight scene router first selects a scene-consistent expert subset, and an instance router then assigns each object query to a small number of experts within that subset. This design aims to preserve sparse computation while better matching the heterogeneous, instance-centric structure of detection. In the current draft, experiments are concentrated on COCO with preliminary specialization analysis on LVIS. Under these settings, HI-MoE improves over a dense DINO baseline and over simpler token-level or instance-only routing variants, with especially strong gains on small objects. We also provide an initial visualization of expert specialization patterns. We present the method, ablations, and current limitations in a form intended to support further experimental validation.

</details>


### [396] [Empowering Power Outage Prediction with Spatially Aware Hybrid Graph Neural Networks and Contrastive Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04916)
*Xuyang Shen,Zijie Pan,Diego Cerrai,Xinxuan Zhang,Christopher Colorio,Emmanouil N. Anagnostou,Dongjin Song*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 开发了空间感知混合图神经网络(SA-HGNN)结合对比学习，用于极端天气导致的停电预测，在四个地区验证了其优越性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 极端天气事件加剧导致频繁大规模停电，现有预测模型缺乏对天气事件空间效应的考虑，需要改进预测精度。

Method: 采用空间感知混合图神经网络(SA-HGNN)编码静态特征(土地覆盖、基础设施)和动态特征(风速、降水)的空间关系，利用对比学习处理不同类型极端天气事件的不平衡问题，通过最小化相似位置间距离和最大化不同事件间距离生成位置特定嵌入。

Result: 在康涅狄格州、西马萨诸塞州、东马萨诸塞州和新罕布什尔州四个公用事业服务区域进行实证研究，SA-HGNN在停电预测方面达到了最先进的性能。

Conclusion: SA-HGNN通过整合空间关系和对比学习，有效提升了极端天气导致的停电预测能力，为电力系统韧性提供了重要工具。

Abstract: Extreme weather events, such as severe storms, hurricanes, snowstorms, and ice storms, which are exacerbated by climate change, frequently cause widespread power outages. These outages halt industrial operations, impact communities, damage critical infrastructure, profoundly disrupt economies, and have far-reaching effects across various sectors. To mitigate these effects, the University of Connecticut and Eversource Energy Center have developed an outage prediction modeling (OPM) system to provide pre-emptive forecasts for electric distribution networks before such weather events occur. However, existing predictive models in the system do not incorporate the spatial effect of extreme weather events. To this end, we develop Spatially Aware Hybrid Graph Neural Networks (SA-HGNN) with contrastive learning to enhance the OPM predictions for extreme weather-induced power outages. Specifically, we first encode spatial relationships of both static features (e.g., land cover, infrastructure) and event-specific dynamic features (e.g., wind speed, precipitation) via Spatially Aware Hybrid Graph Neural Networks (SA-HGNN). Next, we leverage contrastive learning to handle the imbalance problem associated with different types of extreme weather events and generate location-specific embeddings by minimizing intra-event distances between similar locations while maximizing inter-event distances across all locations. Thorough empirical studies in four utility service territories, i.e., Connecticut, Western Massachusetts, Eastern Massachusetts, and New Hampshire, demonstrate that SA-HGNN can achieve state-of-the-art performance for power outage prediction.

</details>


### [397] [Stratifying Reinforcement Learning with Signal Temporal Logic](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04923)
*Justin Curry,Alberto Speranzon*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出基于分层理论的信号时序逻辑（STL）语义，将原子谓词解释为分层空间的成员测试，揭示了分层理论与STL之间的对应关系，为分析深度强化学习的嵌入空间结构提供新框架。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有STL语义分析缺乏对嵌入空间结构的理论框架，需要建立分层理论与STL的对应关系，为深度强化学习的嵌入空间分析提供理论基础和计算工具。

Method: 1. 提出基于分层理论的STL语义，将原子谓词解释为分层空间成员测试；2. 在Minigrid游戏中展示分层理论作用；3. 对DRL智能体潜在嵌入应用数值技术，使用STL公式鲁棒性作为奖励；4. 提出计算高效的特征用于揭示嵌入空间分层结构。

Result: 建立了分层理论与STL之间的对应原则，表明大多数STL公式可视为诱导时空分层；提出了新的理论框架分析DRL嵌入空间结构，并开发了计算高效的特征来揭示分层结构。

Conclusion: 分层理论为STL提供了新的语义解释，建立了与DRL嵌入空间的联系，既支持现有高维分析工具复用，又激励新计算技术开发，为分析智能决策空间几何结构提供了原则性框架。

Abstract: In this paper, we develop a stratification-based semantics for Signal Temporal Logic (STL) in which each atomic predicate is interpreted as a membership test in a stratified space. This perspective reveals a novel correspondence principle between stratification theory and STL, showing that most STL formulas can be viewed as inducing a stratification of space-time. The significance of this interpretation is twofold. First, it offers a fresh theoretical framework for analyzing the structure of the embedding space generated by deep reinforcement learning (DRL) and relates it to the geometry of the ambient decision space. Second, it provides a principled framework that both enables the reuse of existing high-dimensional analysis tools and motivates the creation of novel computational techniques. To ground the theory, we (1) illustrate the role of stratification theory in Minigrid games and (2) apply numerical techniques to the latent embeddings of a DRL agent playing such a game where the robustness of STL formulas is used as the reward. In the process, we propose computationally efficient signatures that, based on preliminary evidence, appear promising for uncovering the stratification structure of such embedding spaces.

</details>


<div id='cs.SE'></div>

# cs.SE [[Back]](#toc)

### [398] [ABTest: Behavior-Driven Testing for AI Coding Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.03362)
*Wuyang Dai,Moses Openja,Hung Viet Pham,Gias Uddin,Jinqiu Yang,Song Wang*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: ABTest是一个行为驱动的模糊测试框架，通过将真实世界故障报告转化为基于代码仓库的行为测试，系统性地测试AI编码代理的鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: AI编码代理越来越多地集成到真实软件开发工作流中，但其在多样化和对抗性场景下的鲁棒性仍未被充分理解，需要系统性的测试方法来发现潜在故障。

Method: ABTest框架包含五个步骤：1) 从用户报告异常中提取可重用工作流模式和行为类型；2) 组合成逐步模糊测试模板；3) 在真实代码仓库中实例化可执行测试用例；4) 使用编码代理执行并记录跟踪和工件；5) 检测和验证异常行为。

Result: 在三个主流编码代理(Claude Code、OpenAI Codex CLI、Gemini CLI)上应用ABTest，从400个用户报告故障中提取47个交互模式和128个行为类型，生成647个基于仓库的模糊测试用例。执行后标记出1,573个行为异常，其中642个被确认为新的真实异常，检测精度达40.8%。

Conclusion: ABTest能有效发现真实世界故障，揭示不同模型间的鲁棒性差异，并暴露先前未报告的故障模式，为AI编码代理的鲁棒性评估提供了系统化方法。

Abstract: AI coding agents are increasingly integrated into real-world software development workflows, yet their robustness under diverse and adversarial scenarios remains poorly understood. We present ABTest, a behavior-driven fuzzing framework that systematically tests coding agents by turning real-world failure reports into repository-grounded behavioral tests. ABTest (1) mines user-reported anomalies to derive reusable workflow patterns (Interaction Patterns) and behaviors (Action types); (2) composes them into stepwise fuzzing templates; (3) instantiates executable test cases in real repositories; (4) executes them with coding agents while recording traces and artifacts; and (5) detects and validates anomalous behaviors.
  We apply ABTest to three widely used coding agents: Claude Code, OpenAI Codex CLI, and Gemini CLI. From 400 user-reported developer-confirmed agent failures, we extract 47 Interaction Patterns and 128 Action types, generating 647 repository-grounded fuzzing cases. Executing the 647-case bundle once per evaluated configuration, ABTest flags 1,573 behavioral anomalies across the three coding agent families, of which 642 are manually confirmed as new true anomalies, achieving a detection precision of 40.8%. Our results demonstrate that ABTest effectively uncovers real-world failures, exposes robustness differences across models, and reveals previously unreported failure modes.

</details>


### [399] [SDVDiag: Using Context-Aware Causality Mining for the Diagnosis of Connected Vehicle Functions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.03391)
*Matthias Weiß,Falk Dettinger,Elias Detrois,Nasser Jazdi,Michael Weyrich*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 提出一种结合人类反馈和系统信息的因果分析方法，用于诊断联网车辆系统故障，相比纯数据驱动方法显著提升精度


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 联网车辆系统故障诊断主要依赖人工，现有自动化分析方法多为纯数据驱动，难以处理隐藏关系和上下文信息，导致诊断效果有限

Method: 采用多模态方法整合人类反馈和系统特定信息，使用人类反馈强化学习持续训练因果挖掘模型，结合分布式追踪数据修剪误报因果链接，并注入领域特定关系优化因果图

Result: 在联网车辆测试场的自动代客泊车应用中评估，因果边检测精度从14%提升至100%，系统可解释性显著改善

Conclusion: 该方法为联网车辆领域系统运营商提供了有效工具，通过整合专家知识和系统信息显著提升了故障诊断的准确性和可解释性

Abstract: Real-world implementations of connected vehicle functions are spreading steadily, yet operating these functions reliably remains challenging due to their distributed nature and the complexity of the underlying cloud, edge, and networking infrastructure. Quick diagnosis of problems and understanding the error chains that lead to failures is essential for reducing downtime. However, diagnosing these systems is still largely performed manually, as automated analysis techniques are predominantly data-driven and struggle with hidden relationships and the integration of context information. This paper addresses this gap by introducing a multimodal approach that integrates human feedback and system-specific information into the causal analysis process. Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback is employed to continuously train a causality mining model while incorporating expert knowledge. Additional modules leverage distributed tracing data to prune false-positive causal links and enable the injection of domain-specific relationships to further refine the causal graph.Evaluation is performed using an automated valet parking application operated in a connected vehicle test field. Results demonstrate a significant increase in precision from 14\% to 100\% for the detection of causal edges and improved system interpretability compared to purely data-driven approaches, highlighting the potential for system operators in the connected vehicle domain.

</details>


### [400] [Android Instrumentation Testing in Continuous Integration: Practices, Patterns, and Performance](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.03438)
*Hamid Parsazadeh,Taher A. Ghaleb,Safwat Hassan*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 研究分析4,518个开源Android应用的CI中仪器测试运行情况，发现仅10.6%仓库运行此类测试，主要使用社区组件或自定义脚本，且配置趋于稳定，向社区组件迁移。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Android仪器测试能发现简单测试遗漏的问题，但在CI中自动运行困难，因为模拟器设置脆弱且配置易漂移。需要了解开源项目如何在CI中运行这些测试。

Method: 分析4,518个使用CI的开源Android仓库（2025年8月10日快照），检查CI工作流文件、脚本和构建配置，识别设备设置方式（如Gradle托管设备），通过提交、PR和问题消息分析变更原因，使用GitHub Actions元数据评估性能。

Result: 1) 仅10.6%仓库在CI中运行仪器测试，主要使用社区可重用组件或自定义脚本；2) 设置通常稳定，变更时倾向于从自定义脚本转向社区组件；3) 团队常为扩大测试覆盖而变更方法，不同方法各有优劣：社区设置最可靠高效，第三方设备实验室适合回归测试但成本高失败多，自定义脚本灵活但重试更多。

Conclusion: Android仪器测试在CI中采用率低，但现有方法各有适用场景：社区组件适合日常检查，第三方实验室适合定期回归测试，自定义脚本提供灵活性但维护成本高。项目正从自定义脚本向标准化社区解决方案迁移。

Abstract: Android instrumentation tests (end-to-end tests that run on a device or emulator) can catch problems that simpler tests miss. However, running these tests automatically in continuous integration (CI) is often difficult because emulator setup is fragile and configurations tend to drift over time. We study how open-source Android apps run instrumentation tests in CI by analyzing 4,518 repositories that use CI (snapshot: Aug. 10, 2025). We examine CI workflow files, scripts, and build configurations to identify cases where device setup is defined in Gradle (e.g., Gradle Managed Devices). Our results answer three questions about adoption, evolution, and outcomes. First, only about one in ten repositories (481/4,518; 10.6%) run instrumentation tests in CI, typically using either reusable community components or repository-specific custom scripts to set up emulators. Second, these setups usually stay the same over time; when changes happen, projects tend to move from custom scripts toward reusable community components. Third, we study why projects change their CI setup by analyzing their commits, pull requests, and issue messages. We evaluate how different setup styles perform using GitHub Actions run- and step-level metadata (e.g., outcomes, duration, reruns, and queue delay). We find that teams often change approaches to expand test coverage, and that each approach fits different needs: community-based setups are typically the most reliable and efficient for everyday checks on new code, third-party device labs suit scheduled regression testing but can be costlier and fail more often, and custom scripting provides flexibility but is associated with more reruns.

</details>


### [401] [Agile Story-Point Estimation: Is RAG a Better Way to Go?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.03443)
*Lamyea Maha,Tajmilur Rahman,Chanchal Roy*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本研究探讨使用检索增强生成(RAG)自动化敏捷开发中的故事点估算，通过两个嵌入模型在23个开源项目上测试，发现RAG在某些情况下优于基线但无统计显著性差异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 敏捷开发中的冲刺规划会议需要开发者通过Planning Poker等共识技术估算任务工作量，这个过程虽然有益但极其耗时。本研究旨在探索是否可以使用RAG技术自动化这一手动过程。

Method: 采用检索增强生成(RAG)框架，包含"检索器"和"生成器"两部分。在两个嵌入模型(bge-large-en-v1.5和all-mpnet-base-v2)上，对23个不同规模的开源软件项目进行实验，考察四个关键方面：检索超参数的影响、项目规模对估算准确性的影响、嵌入模型选择的影响、以及RAG方法与现有基线的比较。

Result: RAG方法在某些情况下优于基线模型，但结果显示在不同项目之间或不同嵌入模型之间的性能没有统计学上的显著差异。这表明需要进一步研究和改进RAG技术。

Conclusion: 虽然RAG在自动化故事点估算方面显示出潜力，但需要进一步的研究和模型适应策略来提高准确性。当前结果强调了改进RAG技术和模型适应方法的必要性。

Abstract: The sprint-based iterative approach in the Agile software development method allows continuous feedback and adaptation. One of the crucial Agile software development activities is the sprint planning session where developers estimate the effort required to complete tasks through a consensus-based estimation technique such as Planning Poker. In the Agile software development method, a common unit of measuring development effort is Story Point (SP) which is assigned to tasks to understand the complexity and development time needed to complete them. Despite the benefits of this process, it is an extremely time-consuming manual process. To mitigate this issue, in this study, we investigated if this manual process can be automated using Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) which comprises a "Retriever" and a "Generator". We applied two embedding models - bge-large-en-v1.5, and Sentence-Transformers' all-mpnet-base-v2 on 23 open-source software projects of varying sizes and examined four key aspects: 1) how retrieval hyper-parameters influence the performance, 2) whether estimation accuracy differs across different sizes of the projects, 3) whether embedding model choice affects accuracy, and 4) how the RAG-based approach compares to the existing baselines. Although the RAG-based approach outperformed the baseline models in several occasions, our results did not exhibit statistically significant differences in performance across the projects or across the embedding models. This highlights the need for further studies and refinement of the RAG, and model adaptation strategies for better accuracy in automatically estimating user stories.

</details>


### [402] [Measuring LLM Trust Allocation Across Conflicting Software Artifacts](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.03447)
*Noshin Ulfat,Ahsanul Ameen Sabit,Soneya Binta Hossain*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: TRACE框架评估LLM在代码、文档、测试等软件工程制品间的信任推理能力，发现现有模型能较好检测文档错误和明显矛盾，但对代码漂移检测较差，且信任校准不佳。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM软件工程助手不仅会输出错误结果，还会在代码、文档、测试不一致时错误分配信任。当前评估主要关注下游结果，无法揭示模型是否识别了证据退化、找到不可靠来源或在各制品间校准信任。

Method: 提出TRACE框架，通过盲扰动在Javadoc、方法签名、实现和测试前缀上获取结构化制品级信任轨迹。使用7个模型在456个Java方法包上生成22,339个有效轨迹，评估每个制品的质量评估、不一致检测、受影响制品归因和来源优先级排序。

Result: 质量惩罚主要局限于被扰动制品且随严重程度增加，但不同制品类型敏感性不对称：文档错误的重度-轻微差距比实现错误大得多。模型能较好检测显式文档错误（67-94%）和Javadoc与实现矛盾（50-91%），但对仅实现漂移而文档仍合理的情况存在系统性盲点，检测率下降7-42个百分点。7个模型中6个的置信度校准较差。

Conclusion: 当前LLM在审核自然语言规范方面优于检测细微代码级漂移，需要在关键下游使用前进行明确的制品级信任推理。

Abstract: LLM-based software engineering assistants fail not only by producing incorrect outputs, but also by allocating trust to the wrong artifact when code, documentation, and tests disagree. Existing evaluations focus mainly on downstream outcomes and therefore cannot reveal whether a model recognized degraded evidence, identified the unreliable source, or calibrated its trust across artifacts. We present TRACE (Trust Reasoning over Artifacts for Calibrated Evaluation), a framework that elicits structured artifact-level trust traces over Javadoc, method signatures, implementations, and test prefixes under blind perturbations. Using 22,339 valid traces from seven models on 456 curated Java method bundles, we evaluate per-artifact quality assessment, inconsistency detection, affected artifact attribution, and source prioritization. Across all models, quality penalties are largely localized to the perturbed artifact and increase with severity, but sensitivity is asymmetric across artifact types: documentation bugs induce a substantially larger heavy-to-subtle gap than implementation faults (0.152-0.253 vs. 0.049-0.123). Models detect explicit documentation bugs well (67-94%) and Javadoc and implementation contradictions at 50-91%, yet show a systematic blind spot when only the implementation drifts while the documentation remains plausible, with detection dropping by 7-42 percentage points. Confidence is poorly calibrated for six of seven models. These findings suggest that current LLMs are better at auditing natural-language specifications than at detecting subtle code-level drift, motivating explicit artifact-level trust reasoning before correctness-critical downstream use.

</details>


### [403] [Inside the Scaffold: A Source-Code Taxonomy of Coding Agent Architectures](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.03515)
*Benjamin Rombaut*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出基于源代码的编码智能体脚手架架构分类法，通过分析13个开源编码智能体的脚手架代码，构建了包含12个维度的三层分类体系，揭示了脚手架架构的多样性和组合性特征。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前LLM编码智能体虽然能定位bug、生成补丁和运行测试，但其脚手架代码（控制循环、工具定义、状态管理、上下文策略）缺乏系统理解。现有研究要么基于抽象能力分类，要么只观察智能体行为而不分析决定这些行为的脚手架架构，因此需要从源代码层面深入分析编码智能体的架构设计。

Method: 通过分析13个开源编码智能体脚手架在固定提交哈希的源代码，构建了包含12个维度的三层分类体系：控制架构、工具与环境接口、资源管理。所有分类主张都基于文件路径和行号进行验证。

Result: 分析发现脚手架架构难以离散分类：控制策略从固定流水线到蒙特卡洛树搜索不等，工具数量从0到37个，上下文压缩策略有7种。5种循环原语（ReAct、生成-测试-修复、计划-执行、多尝试重试、树搜索）可作为可组合构建块，13个智能体中有11个组合了多个原语而非依赖单一控制结构。

Conclusion: 该研究提供了基于源代码的编码智能体脚手架架构分类法，揭示了架构设计在外部约束下收敛、在开放设计问题上发散的特征。所有分类主张都有源代码依据，为研究智能体行为和设计新脚手架提供了可复用的参考框架。

Abstract: LLM-based coding agents can localize bugs, generate patches, and run tests with diminishing human oversight, yet the scaffolding code that surrounds the language model (the control loop, tool definitions, state management, and context strategy) remains poorly understood. Existing surveys classify agents by abstract capabilities (tool use, planning, reflection) that cannot distinguish between architecturally distinct systems, and trajectory studies observe what agents do without examining the scaffold code that determines why. This paper presents a source-code-level architectural taxonomy derived from analysis of 13 open-source coding agent scaffolds at pinned commit hashes. Each agent is characterized across 12 dimensions organized into three layers: control architecture, tool and environment interface, and resource management. The analysis reveals that scaffold architectures resist discrete classification: control strategies range from fixed pipelines to Monte Carlo Tree Search, tool counts range from 0 to 37, and context compaction spans seven distinct strategies. Five loop primitives (ReAct, generate-test-repair, plan-execute, multi-attempt retry, tree search) function as composable building blocks that agents layer in different combinations; 11 of 13 agents compose multiple primitives rather than relying on a single control structure. Dimensions converge where external constraints dominate (tool capability categories, edit formats, execution isolation) and diverge where open design questions remain (context compaction, state management, multi-model routing). All taxonomic claims are grounded in file paths and line numbers, providing a reusable reference for researchers studying agent behavior and practitioners designing new scaffolds.

</details>


### [404] [AgenticFlict: A Large-Scale Dataset of Merge Conflicts in AI Coding Agent Pull Requests on GitHub](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.03551)
*Daniel Ogenrwot,John Businge*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: AgenticFlict数据集揭示AI编程助手在协作开发中产生大量合并冲突（27.67%冲突率），突显AI贡献集成挑战


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究主要关注AI辅助开发的效率提升和接受模式，但对AI生成贡献的集成挑战（特别是合并冲突）了解不足。合并冲突作为协作软件开发的基本问题，在AI编程助手背景下尚未得到充分探索。

Method: 构建AgenticFlict大规模数据集，包含142K+个AI编程助手生成的PR，来自59K+个仓库。通过确定性合并模拟处理107K+个PR，识别29K+个存在合并冲突的PR，提取336K+个细粒度冲突区域。

Result: AI生成的贡献中合并冲突频繁且通常很严重，冲突率达到27.67%。不同AI助手之间存在明显差异，表明需要更好地理解和解决AI辅助软件开发中的集成问题。

Conclusion: AI编程助手在协作开发中产生大量合并冲突，需要更深入理解和管理AI贡献的集成挑战。AgenticFlict数据集为研究这一问题提供了重要资源。

Abstract: Software Engineering 3.0 marks a paradigm shift in software development, in which AI coding agents are no longer just assistive tools but active contributors. While prior empirical studies have examined productivity gains and acceptance patterns in AI-assisted development, the challenges associated with integrating agent-generated contributions remain less understood. In particular, merge conflicts, a fundamental aspect of collaborative software development, remain underexplored in this context. In this paper, we present AgenticFlict, a large-scale dataset of textual merge conflicts in AI coding agent pull requests (Agentic PRs). The dataset comprises 142K+ Agentic PRs collected from 59K+ repositories, of which 107K+ are successfully processed through deterministic merge simulation. Our pipeline identifies 29K+ PRs exhibiting merge conflicts, yielding a conflict rate of 27.67%, and extracts 336K+ fine-grained conflict regions across these instances. Our preliminary exploratory analysis indicates that merge conflicts are both frequent and often substantial in AI-generated contributions, with noticeable variation across agents, emphasizing the need to better understand and manage integration challenges in AI-assisted software development. The dataset, code and supplementary materials are available in zenodo: https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.19396917.

</details>


### [405] [From UI to Code: Mobile Ads Detection via LLM-Unified Static-Dynamic Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.03561)
*Shang Ma,Wei Cheng,Yanfang Ye,Xusheng Xiao*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: ADWISE是一个检测移动广告的新框架，通过LLM引导的UI探索，结合静态程序分析和三种领域指导信号，显著提升了广告检测效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 移动广告检测面临挑战，因为广告内容从远程服务器动态获取，通过多样化的UI呈现，使得广告难以在运行时定位和触发。

Method: ADWISE首先通过静态程序分析识别广告UI组件，然后使用基于LLM的推理循环，在三种领域指导信号下导航并触发这些组件：WTG指导（基于窗口转换图）、语义指导（基于应用功能推理）和结构指导（基于检索增强生成匹配广告布局）。

Result: 在100个基准应用上的实验显示，ADWISE在广告组件检测上比最先进基线方法提升25.60%，并在六个类别中发现了34.34%更多的广告违规行为。

Conclusion: ADWISE通过结合静态程序分析和基于LLM的UI结构、应用语义及检索类比推理，实现了在复杂移动UI中更有效的广告检测，直接有益于下游广告监管。

Abstract: Mobile advertisements (ads) are essential to the app economy, yet detecting them is challenging because ad content is dynamically fetched from remote servers and rendered through diverse user interfaces (UIs), making ads difficult to locate and trigger at runtime. To address this challenge, we present ADWISE, a novel framework that formulates mobile ads detection as LLM-guided, ad-oriented UI exploration. ADWISE first performs static program analysis to identify UI widgets used to place ads, which we call ad widgets. It then uses a grounded LLM reasoning loop to navigate toward and trigger these widgets under three complementary domain guidance signals: (1) WTG-based guidance, which provides global transition priors from a statically constructed window transition graph (WTG); (2) semantic guidance, which reasons over app functionality to prioritize user-likely interaction paths; and (3) structural guidance, which applies retrieval-augmented generation to match the current UI against recurring ad-heavy layouts from a knowledge base. By combining static program analysis with LLM-based reasoning over UI structure, app semantics, and retrieved analogies, ADWISE enables more effective ads detection in complex mobile UIs. Experiments on 100 benchmark apps show that ADWISE outperforms state-of-the-art baselines by 25.60% in ad widget detection. In addition, ADWISE uncovers 34.34% more ad regulation violations across six categories, directly benefiting downstream ad regulation.

</details>


### [406] [DebugHarness: Emulating Human Dynamic Debugging for Autonomous Program Repair](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.03610)
*Maolin Sun,Yibiao Yang,Xuanlin Liu,Yuming Zhou,Baowen Xu*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: DebugHarness：一种利用LLM代理进行动态调试的自主系统，通过实时查询运行时环境来修复复杂安全漏洞，相比纯静态方法提升30%以上修复率


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前自动化安全漏洞修复面临重大挑战：虽然模糊测试等工具能有效发现bug，但修复深层低级故障（如use-after-free、内存损坏）仍需专家手动分析。现有LLM代理将bug修复视为纯静态代码生成任务，缺乏诊断复杂内存安全违规所需的动态执行上下文。

Method: DebugHarness是一个自主的LLM驱动调试代理框架，模拟人类系统工程师的交互式调试实践。它主动查询实时运行时环境，采用模式引导的调查策略：基于可重现崩溃，制定假设，交互式探测程序内存状态和执行路径，并通过闭环验证循环合成补丁。

Result: 在SEC-bench（真实世界C/C++安全漏洞数据集）上评估，DebugHarness成功修复约90%的被评估bug，相比最先进基线方法实现超过30%的相对改进，证明动态调试显著增强LLM诊断能力。

Conclusion: DebugHarness为自动化程序修复建立了新范式，弥合了静态LLM推理与低级系统编程动态复杂性之间的差距，通过动态调试方法显著提升复杂安全漏洞的修复效果。

Abstract: Patching severe security flaws in complex software remains a major challenge. While automated tools like fuzzers efficiently discover bugs, fixing deep-rooted low-level faults (e.g., use-after-free and memory corruption) still requires labor-intensive manual analysis by experts. Emerging Large Language Model (LLM) agents attempt to automate this pipeline, but they typically treat bug fixing as a purely static code-generation task. Relying solely on static artifacts, these methods miss the dynamic execution context strictly necessary for diagnosing intricate memory safety violations. To overcome these limitations, we introduce DebugHarness, an autonomous LLM-powered debugging agent harness that resolves complex vulnerabilities by emulating the interactive debugging practices of human systems engineers. Instead of merely examining static code, DebugHarness actively queries the live runtime environment. Driven by a reproducible crash, it utilizes a pattern-guided investigation strategy to formulate hypotheses, interactively probes program memory states and execution paths, and synthesizes patches via a closed-loop validation cycle. We evaluate DebugHarness on SEC-bench, a rigorous dataset of real-world C/C++ security vulnerabilities. DebugHarness successfully patches approximately 90% of the evaluated bugs. This yields a relative improvement of over 30% compared to state-of-the-art baselines, demonstrating that dynamic debugging significantly enhances LLM diagnostic capabilities. Overall, DebugHarness establishes a novel paradigm for automated program repair, bridging the gap between static LLM reasoning and the dynamic intricacies of low-level systems programming.

</details>


### [407] [Toward Executable Repository-Level Code Generation via Environment Alignment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.03622)
*Ruwei Pan,Junlei Shen,Linhao Wu,Yueheng Zhu,Zixiong Yang,Yakun Zhang,Lu Zhang,Hongyu Zhang*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: EnvGraph是一个用于仓库级代码生成的框架，通过将仓库可执行性建模为环境对齐问题，解决LLM在多文件仓库生成中的执行验证挑战。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM在代码生成方面表现良好，但在仓库级代码生成中面临执行验证挑战。成功不仅取决于孤立代码片段的合理性，更在于生成的多文件仓库能否在实际执行环境中成功安装、依赖解析、启动和验证。

Method: EnvGraph将仓库可执行性建模为环境对齐问题，联合建模两个耦合条件：外部依赖满足和仓库内部引用解析。它维护双层环境表示，使用执行证据进行基于执行证据的归因，并通过统一的定向修订机制在迭代对齐循环中指导仓库生成。

Result: 在三个代表性骨干LLM上进行评估，EnvGraph在仓库级基准测试中始终表现最佳。在功能正确性方面比最强非EnvGraph基线绝对提升5.72-5.87个百分点，在非功能质量方面提升4.58-8.66个百分点。

Conclusion: EnvGraph通过将仓库可执行性建模为环境对齐问题，有效解决了仓库级代码生成的执行验证挑战，显著提升了生成仓库的功能正确性和非功能质量。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have achieved strong performance on code generation, but existing methods still struggle with repository-level code generation under executable validation. Under this evaluation setting, success is determined not by the plausibility of isolated code fragments, but by whether a generated multi-file repository can be successfully installed, have its dependencies and internal references resolved, be launched, and be validated in a real execution environment. To address this challenge, we propose EnvGraph, a framework for repository-level code generation that formulates repository executability as an environment alignment problem. EnvGraph jointly models two coupled conditions for successful repository execution, namely external dependency satisfaction and repository-internal reference resolution. It maintains a dual-layer environment representation, uses execution evidence to perform execution-evidence-based attribution, and guides repository generation through a unified targeted revision mechanism within an iterative alignment loop. We evaluate EnvGraph on repository-level code generation with three representative backbone LLMs and compare it against representative environment-aware and repository-level baselines. Experimental results show that EnvGraph consistently achieves the best performance on these repository-level benchmarks. In particular, it outperforms the strongest non-EnvGraph baseline by an absolute margin of 5.72--5.87 percentage points in Functional Correctness and 4.58--8.66 percentage points in Non-Functional Quality.

</details>


### [408] [Persistent Cross-Attempt State Optimization for Repository-Level Code Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.03632)
*Ruwei Pan,Jiangshuai Wang,Qisheng Zhang,Yueheng Zhu,Linhao Wu,Zixiong Yang,Yakun Zhang,Lu Zhang,Hongyu Zhang*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: LiveCoder是一个基于跨尝试知识优化的仓库级代码生成框架，通过维护任务特定状态（成功知识、失败知识、历史最佳仓库）来指导后续生成，将重复的仓库生成转变为持续的知识驱动优化过程。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法在处理仓库级代码生成任务时，每次尝试都是孤立的，没有保留或重用任务特定状态。这导致解决同一任务需要多次尝试，效率低下。

Method: LiveCoder维护持久化的任务特定状态：1) 成功知识 - 从先前强仓库中捕获可重用信号；2) 失败知识 - 记录不成功结果及其诊断信号；3) 历史最佳仓库 - 保留迄今为止找到的最强结果防止回归。这些组件共同实现跨尝试知识优化。

Result: 在四个前沿LLM和两个代表性仓库级代码生成基准上的实验表明，LiveCoder将功能分数提升高达22.94个百分点，仓库重用率达到81.58%，在RAL-Bench上成本降低高达53.63%，同时保持广泛稳定的非功能质量。

Conclusion: LiveCoder通过跨尝试知识优化显著提高了仓库级代码生成的效率和效果，将重复生成转变为知识驱动的优化过程，为LLM在复杂代码生成任务中的应用提供了新思路。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have achieved substantial progress in repository-level code generation. However, solving the same repository-level task often requires multiple attempts, while existing methods still optimize each attempt in isolation and do not preserve or reuse task-specific state across attempts. In this paper, we propose LiveCoder, a novel framework for repository-level code generation based on cross-attempt knowledge optimization. LiveCoder maintains persistent task-specific state from prior attempts to guide subsequent generation. This state includes success knowledge, which captures reusable signals from previously strong repositories, failure knowledge, which records unsuccessful outcomes and their diagnostic signals, and a historical-best repository, which preserves the strongest result found so far and prevents regression. These components collectively transform repeated repository generation into a persistent, knowledge-driven optimization process. We evaluate LiveCoder using four frontier LLMs on two representative repository-level code generation benchmarks. Extensive experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness and efficiency of LiveCoder, improving the functional score by up to 22.94 percentage points, increasing repository reuse to 81.58%, and reducing cost by up to 53.63% on RAL-Bench while maintaining broadly stable non-functional quality.

</details>


### [409] [Automata Learning versus Process Mining: The Case for User Journeys](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.03686)
*Paul Kobialka,Andrea Pferscher,Bernhard K. Aichernig,Einar Broch Johnsen,Silvia Lizeth Tapia Tarifa*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种结合自动机学习和流程挖掘的混合方法，用于从事件日志中自动生成用户旅程行为模型，以改进服务体验。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着业务服务化，理解用户体验成为企业成功的关键因素。需要将用户反馈纳入软件工程过程，而描述用户与服务交互体验的行为模型可以提供洞察并改进服务。

Method: 首先比较了从事件日志生成行为模型的两种现有技术：自动机学习和流程挖掘。然后提出了一种新颖的混合方法，结合两者的优势来克服各自的局限性。评估了这些技术在真实应用中的准确性。

Result: 结果显示流程挖掘技术依赖专家知识，而自动机学习技术依赖事件日志中的事件分布。提出的混合技术结合了两者的优势，能够自动选择最佳方法和参数设置，学习出非常准确的模型。

Conclusion: 混合方法能够自动为给定事件日志选择最佳技术，结合了流程挖掘和自动机学习的优势，为从数字服务事件日志中提取用户旅程模型提供了更有效的解决方案。

Abstract: With the servitization of business, understanding how users experience services becomes a crucial success factor for companies. Therefore, there is a need to include feedback from user experiences in the software engineering process. Behavioral models of user journeys, describing how users experience their interaction with a service, can provide insights and potentially improve services. In this paper, we investigate techniques that allow the automatic generation of behavioral models from user interactions with a service, recorded in an event log. We first compare two established techniques that generate behavioral models from a given event log: automata learning and process mining. Afterward, we present a novel, hybrid method that combines both automata learning and process mining methods to overcome their limitations. For the existing techniques, we present methods to learn models of user journeys and evaluate the accuracy of the resulting models. We then compare these techniques with our novel method for the automatic extraction of user journey models from the event logs of digital services. We assess the practical applicability of all techniques by evaluating real-world applications. Our results show that process mining techniques rely on expert knowledge, while automata learning techniques depend on the distribution of events in the given event log. We further show that the proposed hybrid technique combines the strengths of both process mining and automata learning, automatically selecting the best method and parameter settings for a given event log to learn very accurate models.

</details>


### [410] [Runtime Enforcement for Operationalizing Ethics in Autonomous Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.03714)
*Martina De Sanctis,Gianluca Filippone,Paola Inverardi,Raffaela Mirandola,Sara Pettinari,Patrizia Scandurra*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: SLEEC@run.time：一种基于运行时执行的自主系统伦理保障方法，通过ASM形式化模型和MAPE-K控制循环动态评估、适应和执行SLEEC（社会、法律、伦理、共情、文化）规则。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决自主系统中伦理原则的操作化挑战，确保系统在运行时能够遵守并适应不断变化的伦理要求，特别是社会、法律、伦理、共情和文化等多维度规则。

Method: 提出SLEEC@run.time方法：1）概念化系统的伦理空间和结构化伦理保障流程；2）基于抽象状态机（ASM）形式化SLEEC规则；3）采用MAPE-K控制循环架构构建执行子系统，实现监控、分析、规划和执行；4）建立基于ASM的运行时伦理规则模型，支持动态评估和适应。

Result: 在辅助机器人场景中验证了SLEEC@run.time的有效性，展示了机器人的行为和治理伦理规则能够根据上下文变化动态适应。系统能够处理SLEEC规则的添加或移除等变化，确保伦理原则的遵守，且执行时间开销可忽略不计。

Conclusion: SLEEC@run.time为自主系统提供了一种强大且可演进的伦理保障方法，通过灵活的运行时模型实现了伦理规则的操作化执行和动态适应，为自主系统的伦理合规性提供了可行的技术解决方案。

Abstract: This paper addresses the challenge of operationalizing ethics in autonomous systems through runtime enforcement. It first conceptualizes the system's ethical space and outlines a structured ethics assurance process. Building on this foundation, it introduces an enforcement subsystem that operationalizes ethical rules, specifically social, legal, ethical, empathetic, and cultural (SLEEC) requirements, through the Abstract State Machine (ASM) formalism. The enforcement subsystem is built on the MAPE-K control-loop architecture for monitoring and controlling the system's ethical behavior, and it relies on an ASM-based runtime model of the ethical rules to enforce. This enables the dynamic evaluation, adaptation, and enforcement of ethical behavior within a runtime formal model. The overall approach, named SLEEC@run.time, is demonstrated on an assistive robot scenario, showcasing how both the robot's behavior and the governing ethical rules can dynamically adapt to contextual changes. By leveraging a flexible runtime model, SLEEC@run.time accommodates changes such as the addition or removal of SLEEC rules, ensuring a robust and evolvable approach to ethical assurance in autonomous systems. The evaluation of SLEEC@run.time shows that it effectively ensures the system's adherence to ethical principles with negligible execution time overhead.

</details>


### [411] [AutoReSpec: A Framework for Generating Specification using Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.03758)
*Ragib Shahariar Ayon,Shibbir Ahmed*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: AutoReSpec是一个结合开源和闭源LLM的协作框架，用于生成可验证的形式化规范，通过动态选择LLM对和提示配置，利用验证器反馈进行修正，在72个Java程序上取得了67/72的通过率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM生成形式化规范的方法存在局限性：生成的规范经常因语法错误、逻辑不准确或不完整推理而验证失败，特别是在包含循环或分支逻辑的程序中。现有技术如SpecGen和FormalBench依赖静态提示，缺乏失败恢复机制或适应不同程序结构的能力。

Method: AutoReSpec是一个协作框架，结合开源和闭源LLM。它基于输入程序的结构动态选择LLM对和提示配置。如果主LLM失败，会调用协作模型，利用验证器反馈来细化和修正规范。这种两阶段设计兼顾速度和鲁棒性。

Result: 在72个真实世界和合成的Java程序基准测试中，AutoReSpec取得了67/72的通过率，在成功概率（58.2%）和完整性（69.2%）方面均优于SpecGen和FormalBench，同时将评估时间平均减少了26.89%。

Conclusion: AutoReSpec为基于LLM的形式化规范生成提供了一个可扩展、高效且可靠的方法，通过协作框架和动态配置显著提高了生成规范的质量和验证成功率。

Abstract: Formal specification generation has recently drawn attention in software engineering as a way to improve program correctness without requiring manual annotations. Large Language Models (LLMs) have shown promise in this area, but early results reveal several limitations. Generated specifications often fail verification due to syntax errors, logical inaccuracies, or incomplete reasoning, especially in programs with loops or branching logic. Techniques like SpecGen and FormalBench attempt to address this through prompting and benchmarking, but they typically rely on static prompts and do not offer mechanisms for recovering from failure or adapting to different program structures. In this paper, we present AutoReSpec, a collaborative framework that combines open and closed-source LLMs for verifiable specification generation. AutoReSpec dynamically chooses an LLM pair and prompt configuration based on the structure of the input program. If the primary LLM fails to produce a valid output, a collaborative model is invoked, using validator feedback to refine and correct the specification. This two-stage design enables both speed and robustness. We evaluate AutoReSpec on a new benchmark of 72 real-world and synthetic Java programs. Our results show that it achieves 67 passes out of 72, outperforming SpecGen and FormalBench in both Success Probability and Completeness. Our experimental evaluation achieves a 58.2% success probability and a 69.2% completeness score, while cutting evaluation time by 26.89% on average compared to prior methods. Together, these results demonstrate that AutoReSpec offers a scalable, efficient, and reliable approach to LLM-based formal specification generation.

</details>


### [412] [The Last APK: Retiring Android SDK Development for Institutional Software Using Python-Django, HTMX, and a WebView Bridge](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.03808)
*Rahul Patel*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 使用HTMX-Django构建的校园管理系统，无需原生Android开发，通过超媒体驱动实现移动响应式界面，显著降低开发时间和HTTP负载


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 挑战移动企业软件必须使用原生Android SDK开发的传统假设，指出这种假设不仅过时，而且在机构部署中造成经济浪费和技术不必要

Method: 采用Python-Django后端框架和HTMX前端技术，构建包含任务调度、库存管理、园艺跟踪、考勤、请假流程和照片采集等功能的校园管理系统，完全基于Web技术，无需Android SDK

Result: 开发时间减少约54%，平均HTTP负载比完整页面重载减少91%，用户满意度达到4.2/5.0（基于42名校园员工的评估）

Conclusion: HTMX-Django方法为机构移动应用开发提供了经济高效的技术方案，无需依赖原生Android开发或外部云服务，通过自托管Docker部署实现完整功能

Abstract: The assumption that mobile enterprise software requires native Android SDK development has persisted for over a decade, but for institutional deployments, this assumption is not merely outdated: it is economically wasteful and technically unnecessary. This paper presents a campus management system built during an internship at the Indian Institute of Technology Gandhinagar (IIT Gandhinagar), covering housekeeping task scheduling, inventory management, horticulture tracking, worker attendance, multi-stage leave workflows, and client-side photo capture with automatic compression. The core stack uses Python-Django as the backend framework and HTMX for hypermedia-driven, mobile-responsive partial DOM updates, containing zero lines of Android SDK application logic. The entire system runs as a self-hosted Docker Compose deployment with no dependency on any external cloud service. Through architectural analysis, HTTP payload measurement, and user experience evaluation with 42 campus staff, we demonstrate that the HTMX-Django approach reduces development time by approximately 54%, reduces average HTTP payload by 91% versus full-page reload, and achieves user satisfaction scores of 4.2/5.0.

</details>


### [413] [Context Matters: Evaluating Context Strategies for Automated ADR Generation Using LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.03826)
*Aviral Gupta,Rudra Dhar,Daniel Feitosa,Karthik Vaidhyanathan*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: LLMs能有效减轻ADR编写负担，上下文工程比模型规模更重要，小窗口（3-5个近期记录）的上下文策略在质量和效率间达到最佳平衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: ADR在系统设计中至关重要，但因其编写和维护负担常被忽视。研究旨在探索LLM能否减轻此负担，并分析不同历史ADR上下文呈现策略对生成质量的影响。

Method: 从750个开源仓库收集并验证大型顺序ADR语料库，系统评估五种上下文选择策略（无上下文、全历史、前K个、后K个、检索增强生成RAF），在多个模型家族上进行测试。

Result: 上下文感知提示显著提升ADR生成保真度，小窗口（3-5个近期记录）在质量和效率间达到最佳平衡。检索增强策略在非顺序或交叉决策场景中有边际收益，但在典型线性ADR工作流中无统计显著优势。

Conclusion: 上下文工程而非模型规模是有效ADR自动化的主导因素，研究为工具构建者提供了实用默认设置，并为复杂架构场景设计了针对性检索回退机制。

Abstract: Architecture Decision Records (ADRs) play a critical role in preserving the rationale behind system design, yet their creation and maintenance are often neglected due to the associated authoring overhead. This paper investigates whether Large Language Models (LLMs) can mitigate this burden and, more importantly, how different strategies for presenting historical ADRs as context influence generation quality. We curate and validate a large corpus of sequential ADRs drawn from 750 open-source repositories and systematically evaluate five context selection strategies (no context, All-history, First-K, Last-K, and RAFG) across multiple model families. Our results show that context-aware prompting substantially improves ADR generation fidelity, with a small recency window (typically 3-5 prior records) providing the best balance between quality and efficiency. Retrieval-based context selection yields marginal gains primarily in non-sequential or cross-cutting decision scenarios, while offering no statistically significant advantage in typical linear ADR workflows.
