Overall, our findings demonstrate that context engineering, rather than model scale alone, is the dominant factor in effective ADR automation, and we outline practical defaults for tool builders along with targeted retrieval fallbacks for complex architectural settings.

</details>


### [414] [Mapping GitHub Sponsorships: A Longitudinal Observatory for Open-Source Sustainability](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.03846)
*Rylan Hiltz,Taher A. Ghaleb*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 论文介绍了一个用于追踪和分析GitHub Sponsors生态系统的实时观测平台，该平台通过优先级图遍历和每日增量更新收集数据，并提供交互式仪表板和CSV导出功能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 开源软件的财务可持续性至关重要，但关于资金支持的系统性研究仍然有限。GitHub Sponsors作为2019年推出的开发者对开发者直接资助模式，缺乏批量API访问，阻碍了大规模研究。

Method: 构建了一个持续运行的观测平台，采用基于优先级的图遍历算法进行每日增量更新，实现实时数据规范化，并通过交互式仪表板和CSV导出提供数据访问。

Result: 在72小时运行中收集的样本数据集包含来自144个国家的49,000多名用户，初步结果显示存在强烈的参与不对称性和地理集中现象，为后续研究提供了方向。

Conclusion: 该观测平台为研究者和实践者提供了探索GitHub Sponsors生态系统的工具，揭示了资金支持模式中的系统性特征，有助于推动开源软件财务可持续性的研究。

Abstract: Financial sustainability is vital for open-source software, yet systematic research on funding remains limited. GitHub Sponsors, launched in 2019 as a direct developer-to-developer funding model, lacks bulk API access, hindering large-scale studies. This paper introduces a live, continuously operating observatory for tracking and analyzing the GitHub Sponsors ecosystem. The observatory performs priority-based graph traversal with daily incremental updates, real-time normalization, and exposes collected data through an interactive dashboard and analysis-ready CSV exports. A sample dataset collected during a 72-hour run captures 49K+ users across 144 countries and serves as an example of the tool's output, not a fixed deliverable. An interactive dashboard (https://github-sponsorships.com) enables practitioners and researchers to explore sponsorship patterns, filter by geography and demographics, and benchmark against funded peers. Preliminary results on the sample show strong participation asymmetries and geographic concentration, suggesting several research directions.

</details>


### [415] [Beyond Crash-to-Patch: Patch Evolution for Linux Kernel Repair](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.03851)
*Luyao Bai,Kenan Alghythee,Hang Zhang,Xiaoguang Wang*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 该论文提出PatchAdvisor框架，通过分析Linux内核补丁演化历史来指导自动修复，相比传统方法能生成更符合审查者要求的补丁。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有Linux内核bug修复方法通常直接将崩溃报告映射到代码补丁，但实际中内核修复需要经过邮件列表的迭代修订，审查者反馈会修正正确性、并发处理和API合规性。这种迭代精炼过程包含了现有自动化方法忽视的宝贵修复知识。

Method: 首先进行大规模内核补丁演化研究，重建6946个syzbot相关的bug修复生命周期，连接崩溃报告、重现器、邮件列表讨论、修订历史和合并修复。基于这些洞察开发PatchAdvisor框架，整合基于检索的记忆和微调的诊断顾问，指导编码代理生成符合审查者要求的补丁。

Result: 分析证实接受的修复通常是非局部的，并受审查者强制约束的支配，这些约束在bug报告中不存在。在时间上保留的syzbot案例评估显示，利用补丁演化历史相比无指导和仅检索的基线方法，在审查者对齐的精炼信号和端到端修复质量方面都有可衡量的提升。

Conclusion: Linux内核修复的迭代演化过程包含重要知识，通过分析这些历史数据并构建PatchAdvisor框架，可以显著提升自动修复的质量和与审查者要求的一致性。

Abstract: Linux kernel bug repair is typically approached as a direct mapping from crash reports to code patches. In practice, however, kernel fixes undergo iterative revision on mailing lists before acceptance, with reviewer feedback shaping correctness, concurrency handling, and API compliance. This iterative refinement process encodes valuable repair knowledge that existing automated approaches overlook.
  We present a large-scale study of kernel patch evolution, reconstructing 6946 syzbot-linked bug-fix lifecycles that connect crash reports, reproducers, mailing-list discussions, revision histories, and merged fixes. Our analysis confirms that accepted repairs are frequently non-local and governed by reviewer-enforced constraints not present in bug reports. Building on these insights, we develop PatchAdvisor, a repair framework that integrates retrieval-based memory with a fine-tuned diagnostic advisor to guide a coding agent toward reviewer-aligned patches. Evaluation on temporally held-out syzbot cases demonstrates that leveraging patch-evolution history yields measurable gains in both reviewer-aligned refinement signals and end-to-end repair quality compared to unguided and retrieval-only baselines.

</details>


### [416] [COBOLAssist: Analyzing and Fixing Compilation Errors for LLM-Powered COBOL Code Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.03978)
*Anh T. V. Dau,Shin Hwei Tan,Jinqiu Yang,Nghi D. Q. Bui,Anh Tuan Nguyen*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 该论文提出COBOLAssist框架，利用大语言模型修复COBOL编译错误，将编译成功率从29.5%提升至95.89%，显著改善遗留系统维护问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: COBOL等遗留编程语言在商业计算中仍然至关重要，但由于熟练开发人员减少和COBOL错误需要深厚领域专业知识来解决，维护遗留COBOL系统变得越来越困难。当前大语言模型生成的COBOL代码存在大量编译错误，需要有效解决方案。

Method: 首先将LLM生成的COBOL代码编译错误分为三类：不完整代码错误、语法错误和类型相关错误。然后提出COBOLAssist技术，通过编译反馈指导的迭代修复来增强代码正确性。使用包括GPT变体和mAInframer在内的五种LLM进行评估。

Result: 评估显示COBOL程序中存在大量不正确的程序结构和函数使用。COBOLAssist显著提高了编译成功率：GPT-4o-mini从29.5%提升到64.38%，GPT-4o从41.8%提升到95.89%。同时显著改善了pass@1指标，例如GPT-4从9.1提升到22.6。虽然mAInframer-34B达到最高编译成功率，但其功能正确性仍然有限。

Conclusion: 这项研究不仅突显了当前LLM在COBOL方面的局限性，还为遗留系统的自动化调试展示了一条实用路径。COBOLAssist框架通过迭代修复显著提高了代码正确性，为解决COBOL维护挑战提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: Legacy programming languages such as COBOL (Common Business-Oriented Language) remain critical in business computing. However, maintaining legacy COBOL systems is increasingly challenging due to a declining pool of skilled developers and the persistence of COBOL errors that require deep domain expertise to resolve. This paper investigates the challenges of COBOL compilation errors and introduces a framework leveraging large language models (LLMs) to address these issues. We first categorize the common compilation errors in LLM-generated COBOL code into three groups: incomplete code errors, syntax errors, and type-related errors. We further propose COBOLAssist, a technique to enhance code correctness through iterative repairs guided by compilation feedback. Our evaluation using five LLMs including GPT variants and mAInframer, shows a high prevalence of incorrect program structures and function usage in COBOL programs and demonstrates the effectiveness of COBOLAssist, with the compilation success rates increasing from 29.5\% to 64.38\% for GPT-4o-mini and from 41.8\% to 95.89\% for GPT-4o. It also improves pass@1 significantly, for example from 9.1 to 22.6 for GPT-4. Notably, while mAInframer-34B achieves the highest compilation success rate, its functional correctness remains limited. This research not only highlights the limitations in current LLMs for COBOL but also demonstrates a practical path forward for automated debugging in legacy systems.

</details>


### [417] [COBOL-Coder: Domain-Adapted Large Language Models for COBOL Code Generation and Translation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.03986)
*Anh T. V. Dau,Shin Hwei Tan,Jinqiu Yang,Nghi D. Q. Bui,Anh Tuan Nguyen*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 开发了专门针对COBOL的领域适应LLM（COBOL-Coder），通过自动化数据筛选和微调，显著提升了COBOL代码生成和翻译的质量，在编译成功率和功能正确性上大幅超越通用LLM。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: COBOL在大型机系统中仍然至关重要，但现有大型语言模型在生成和翻译COBOL代码时表现不佳，需要专门针对COBOL领域进行优化。

Method: 1. 自动化数据筛选管道：结合编译器引导验证和多阶段相似性过滤构建高质量COBOL训练数据；2. COBOL-Coder：在筛选的COBOL领域数据上进行微调的专门化LLM。

Result: COBOL-Coder在COBOLEval上达到73.95%编译成功率和49.33 Pass-1，显著优于GPT-4o的41.8%和16.4；在Java到COBOL翻译任务中达到34.93 Pass-1，而通用LLM接近零分；开发者调查显示COBOL-Coder具有更强的COBOL意识、更可靠的程序结构和更好的企业实践对齐。

Conclusion: 领域适应的LLM方法能有效提升COBOL代码生成和翻译的质量，COBOL-Coder在多个评估指标上显著优于通用LLM，为大型机软件工程提供了实用的AI辅助工具。

Abstract: COBOL remains a critical language for mainframe systems, yet existing large language models (LLMs) struggle to generate and translate COBOL code correctly. This paper reports our experience in developing and evaluating domain-adapted LLMs for COBOL and mainframe software engineering. We introduce (1) an automated data curation pipeline that combines compiler-guided validation with multi-stage similarity-based filtering to construct high-quality COBOL training data, and (2) COBOL-Coder, a COBOL-specialized LLM fine-tuned on the curated COBOL domain data. We evaluate COBOL-Coder on two tasks: code generation (on COBOLEval and COBOLCodeBench) and code translation (on COBOL-JavaTrans, our proposed benchmark for bidirectional COBOL-Java translation). In our experiments, COBOL-Coder achieves up to a 73.95 percent compilation success rate and 49.33 Pass-1 on COBOLEval, compared to 41.8 percent and 16.4 for GPT-4o, while most open-source baselines (e.g., CodeGemma, CodeLlama, StarCoder2) fail to produce compilable programs. For Java-to-COBOL translation, COBOL-Coder reaches 34.93 Pass-1, whereas general-purpose LLMs achieve near-zero scores. To assess the usability of LLM-generated code in real-world settings, we conduct a survey with experienced COBOL developers. Participants consistently report that COBOL-Coder exhibits stronger COBOL awareness, has more reliable program structure, and is better aligned with enterprise practices than general-purpose LLMs.

</details>


### [418] [Benchmarking and Evaluating VLMs for Software Architecture Diagram Understanding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04009)
*Shuyin Ouyang,Jie M. Zhang,Jingzhi Gong,Gunel Jahangirova,Mohammad Reza Mousavi,Jack Johns,Beum Seuk Lee,Adam Ziolkowski,Botond Virginas,Joost Noppen*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: SADU是一个评估视觉语言模型理解软件架构图能力的基准，包含154个架构图、2431个问答任务，测试11个先进模型发现其表现不佳，揭示了模型在图表推理方面的弱点。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 虽然大语言模型在代码相关任务上取得进展，但视觉语言模型理解软件架构图的能力尚未充分探索。软件架构图是重要的设计工件，需要在软件开发生命周期中准确理解，当前模型在这方面的能力存在差距。

Method: 创建SADU基准，包含154个精心策划的行为图、结构图和ER图，配有结构化标注和2431个问答任务，涵盖计数和检索推理。评估了来自Gemini、Claude、GPT和Qwen家族的11个先进视觉语言模型。

Result: 软件架构图理解对当前模型仍然具有挑战性：表现最佳的gemini-3-flash-preview仅达到70.18%准确率，gpt-4o-mini仅17.77%。结果揭示了模型在图表推理和视觉关系基础方面的弱点。

Conclusion: SADU为未来研究提供了基础，强调了当前视觉语言模型与设计阶段软件工程需求之间的差距，需要开发更准确的图表感知AI系统和AI辅助软件工程工作流。

Abstract: Software architecture diagrams are important design artifacts for communicating system structure, behavior, and data organization throughout the software development lifecycle. Although recent progress in large language models has substantially advanced code-centric software engineering tasks such as code generation, testing, and maintenance, the ability of modern vision-language models (VLMs) to understand software architecture diagrams remains underexplored. To address this gap, we present SADU, a benchmark for Software Architecture Diagram Understanding that evaluates VLMs on architecture diagrams as structured software engineering artifacts rather than generic images. SADU contains 154 carefully curated diagrams spanning behavioral, structural, and ER diagrams, paired with structured annotations and 2,431 question-answer tasks covering counting and retrieval reasoning. We evaluate 11 state-of-the-art VLMs from the Gemini, Claude, GPT, and Qwen families.
  Our results show that software architecture diagram understanding remains challenging for current models: the best-performing model gemini-3-flash-preview achieves only 70.18\% accuracy, while gpt-4o-mini only achieves 17.77\% accuracy. The results further reveal the weaknesses in diagram reasoning and visual relation grounding, highlighting a gap between current VLMs and the needs of design-stage software engineering. SADU provides a foundation for future research on diagram-aware AI systems and more faithful AI-assisted software engineering workflows.

</details>


### [419] [SmartPatchLinker: An Open-Source Tool to Linked Changes Detection for Code Review](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04045)
*Islem Khemissi,Moataz Chouchen,Dong Wang,Raula Gaikovina Kula*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: SmartPatchLinker是一个浏览器扩展工具，可在代码审查界面中自动发现语义相关的补丁，减少重复工作和审查延迟。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大型软件生态系统中，语义相关的代码变更（如替代解决方案或重叠修改）通常在提交数天后才被发现，导致重复工作和审查延迟。

Method: 实现为轻量级Chrome扩展，带有本地推理后端，集成Gerrit系统，在审查者打开补丁时检索并排名语义相关的变更，支持配置搜索范围、查看带置信度指示的候选结果。

Result: 工具开源可用，包含源代码、Docker容器和评估复现包，进行了有用性和可用性评估，研究其在代码审查中的支持作用。

Conclusion: SmartPatchLinker直接在代码审查界面中支持发现相关补丁，无需离开工作流程或依赖服务器端安装，有助于提高审查效率。

Abstract: In large software ecosystems, semantically related code changes, such as alternative solutions or overlapping modifications are often discovered only days after submission, leading to duplicated effort and delayed reviews. We present SmartPatchLinker, a browser based tool that supports the discovery of related patches directly within the code review interface. SmartPatchLinker is implemented as a lightweight Chrome extension with a local inference backend and integrates with Gerrit to retrieve and rank semantically linked changes when a reviewer opens a patch. The tool allows reviewers to configure the search scope, view ranked candidates with confidence indicators, and examine related work without leaving their workflow or relying on server-side installations. We perform both usefulness and usability evaluations to study how SmartPatchLinker can support reviewers during code review.
  SmartPatchLinker is open source, and its source code, Docker containers, and the replication package used in our evaluation are publicly available on GitHub at https://github.com/islem-kms/gerrit-chrome-extension . A video demonstrating the tool is also available online at https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1MCcTj5OSlT7lHVBFMq5m9iatas2joaGb

</details>


### [420] [Software Testing Beyond Closed Worlds: Open-World Games as an Extreme Case](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04047)
*Yusaku Kato,Norihiro Yoshida,Erina Makihara,Katsuro Inoue*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 论文探讨传统软件测试的封闭世界假设在现代不确定、非确定性系统中的局限性，以开放世界游戏为例，提出超越封闭世界假设的测试愿景。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统软件测试基于封闭世界假设（有限状态空间、可重复执行、稳定测试预言），但现代软件系统在不确定、非确定性和动态环境中运行，这些假设不再适用。开放世界游戏作为极端案例，揭示了这些局限性。

Method: 基于先前工作的观察，识别出使此类系统测试复杂化的特征：不可穷尽的行为空间、非确定性执行结果、难以捉摸的行为边界、不稳定的测试预言。基于这些观察，提出超越封闭世界假设的软件测试愿景。

Result: 识别了开放世界系统中测试面临的核心挑战特征，并提出了支持在不确定性下系统行为表征和解释的测试新愿景。讨论了自动化测试生成、评估指标和实证研究设计的研究方向。

Conclusion: 虽然以开放世界游戏为动机领域，但本文讨论的挑战和方向适用于更广泛的在动态和不确定环境中运行的软件系统。需要重新思考软件测试方法以适应现代系统的复杂性。

Abstract: Software testing research has traditionally relied on closed-world assumptions, such as finite state spaces, reproducible executions, and stable test oracles. However, many modern software systems operate under uncertainty, non-determinism, and evolving conditions, challenging these assumptions. This paper uses open-world games as an extreme case to examine the limitations of closed-world testing. Through a set of observations grounded in prior work, we identify recurring characteristics that complicate testing in such systems, including inexhaustible behavior spaces, non-deterministic execution outcomes, elusive behavioral boundaries, and unstable test oracles. Based on these observations, we articulate a vision of software testing beyond closed-world assumptions, in which testing supports the characterization and interpretation of system behavior under uncertainty. We further discuss research directions for automated test generation, evaluation metrics, and empirical study design. Although open-world games serve as the motivating domain, the challenges and directions discussed in this paper extend to a broader class of software systems operating in dynamic and uncertain environments.

</details>


### [421] [Humans Integrate, Agents Fix: How Agent-Authored Pull Requests Are Referenced in Practice](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04059)
*Islem Khemissi,Moataz Chouchen,Dong Wang,Raula Gaikovina Kula*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 该研究分析了AI编程代理在代码审查过程中的协作动态，发现人类主要引用AI生成的PR来构建新功能，而AI则用于修复错误，这些引用相关的PR具有更长的生命周期和审查时间。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管编码代理在协作软件开发中引入了新的协调动态，但实际中的详细交互（特别是代码审查过程）仍未得到充分探索。研究旨在理解人类与AI代理之间在代码审查中的交互模式。

Method: 从AIDev数据集中挖掘AI代理编写的PR引用，引入分类法来表征人类到代理和代理到代理交互中这些引用的意图，分析引用模式、生命周期和审查时间等指标。

Result: 人类发起大多数对AI代理编写PR的引用，其中很大部分是AI辅助的，表明出现了元协作工作流。人类主要用引用来构建新功能，而代理则用于修复错误。被引用/引用的PR相比孤立PR具有显著更长的生命周期和审查时间，表明更高的协调或集成工作量。

Conclusion: 研究揭示了AI编程代理在代码审查中的协作动态，提出了三个关键要点作为未来研究方向，探讨如何利用这些动态优化代码审查过程中的AI编码代理。

Abstract: Although coding agents have introduced new coordination dynamics in collaborative software development, detailed interactions in practice remain underexplored, especially for the code review process. In this study, we mine agent-authored PR references from the AIDev dataset and introduce a taxonomy to characterize the intent of these references across Human-to-Agent and Agent-to-Agent interactions in the form of Pull Requests (i.e. PRs). Our analysis shows that while humans initiate most references to agent-authored PRs, a substantial portion of these interactions are AI-assisted, indicating the emergence of meta-collaborative workflows, where humans mostly use references to build new features, whereas agents make them to fix errors. We further find that referencing/referenced PRs are associated with substantially longer lifespans and review times compared to isolated PRs, suggesting higher coordination or integration effort. We then list three key takeaways as potential future research directions into how to utilize these dynamics for optimizing AI coding agents in the code review process.

</details>


### [422] [Toward a Sustainable Software Architecture Community: Evaluating ICSA's Environmental Impact](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04096)
*Mahyar T. Moghaddam,Mina Alipour,Torben Worm,Mikkel Baun Kjærgaard*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 首次系统审计软件架构研究中GenAI使用的碳足迹和传统会议活动碳足迹，包括ICSA会议论文的AI推理排放和ICSA 2025会议运营排放


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 生成式AI工具在软件架构研究中日益普及，但其计算使用的环境影响尚未被充分记录，需要系统评估研究活动中的碳足迹

Method: 采用系统审计方法，在两个不同系统边界内建立碳清单：1) 研究边界内接受论文的GenAI推理使用足迹估算；2) 会议时间边界内ICSA 2025的参会和运营足迹（旅行、住宿、餐饮、场地能源、材料）

Result: 提供了软件架构研究社区相关的两个独立碳清单，支持透明度和社区反思，揭示了GenAI使用和会议活动的环境影响

Conclusion: 研究支持在ICSA社区及更广泛范围内建立更气候意识的研究文化，提出了可持续软件架构的建议，包括透明度、绿色会议规划和GenAI操作能效改进

Abstract: Generative AI (GenAI) tools are increasingly integrated into software architecture research, yet the environmental impact of their computational usage remains largely undocumented. This study presents the first systematic audit of the carbon footprint of both the digital footprint from GenAI usage in research papers, and the traditional footprint from conference activities within the context of the IEEE International Conference on Software Architecture (ICSA). We report two separate carbon inventories relevant to the software architecture research community: i) an exploratory estimate of the footprint of GenAI inference usage associated with accepted papers within a research-artifact boundary, and ii) the conference attendance and operations footprint of ICSA 2025 (travel, accommodation, catering, venue energy, and materials) within the conference time boundary. These two inventories, with different system boundaries and completeness, support transparency and community reflection. We discuss implications for sustainable software architecture, including recommendations for transparency, greener conference planning, and improved energy efficiency in GenAI operations. Our work supports a more climate-conscious research culture within the ICSA community and beyond

</details>


### [423] [C2|Q>: A Robust Framework for Bridging Classical and Quantum Software Development -- RCR Report](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04112)
*Boshuai Ye,Arif Ali Khan,Teemu Pihkakoski,Peng Liang,Muhammad Azeem Akbar,Matti Silveri,Lauri Malmi*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: C2|Q>是一个将经典问题规范转换为可执行量子程序的模块化框架，支持多种问题类型和硬件后端，并提供了完整的开源实现和评估数据。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 量子计算领域需要将经典问题规范高效转换为量子程序，但现有工具往往缺乏模块化、硬件无关性和易用性。该框架旨在弥合经典与量子软件开发之间的鸿沟。

Method: 开发了一个模块化、硬件无关的框架，能够将Python代码或结构化JSON等经典问题规范转换为可在多种硬件后端执行的量子程序。框架包含预训练解析器模型、评估数据和PyPI包。

Result: 成功实现了支持10个问题家族的框架，提供了完整的开源代码、预训练模型、评估数据和安装包。实验1通过预训练模型和训练笔记本支持，实验2和3可通过文档化的make目标直接执行。

Conclusion: C2|Q>框架为经典到量子程序的转换提供了健壮的解决方案，通过开源实现和完整文档促进了量子计算的可重复研究和实际应用。

Abstract: This is the Replicated Computational Results (RCR) Report for the paper C2|Q>: A Robust Framework for Bridging Classical and Quantum Software Development. The paper introduces a modular, hardware-agnostic framework that translates classical problem specifications - Python code or structured JSON - into executable quantum programs across ten problem families and multiple hardware backends. We release the framework source code on GitHub at https://github.com/C2-Q/C2Q, a pretrained parser model on Zenodo at https://zenodo.org/records/19061125, evaluation data in a separate Zenodo record at https://zenodo.org/records/17071667, and a PyPI package at https://pypi.org/project/c2q-framework/ for lightweight CLI and API use. Experiment 1 is supported through a released pretrained model and training notebook, while Experiments 2 and 3 are directly executable via documented make targets. This report describes the artifact structure, setup instructions, and the mapping from each execution route to the corresponding experiment.

</details>


### [424] [ENCRUST: Encapsulated Substitution and Agentic Refinement on a Live Scaffold for Safe C-to-Rust Translation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04527)
*Hohyun Sim,Hyeonjoong Cho,Ali Shokri,Zhoulai Fu,Binoy Ravindran*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: Encrust是一个两阶段C-to-Rust翻译系统，通过ABI保持的封装包装和代理精炼，在保持程序正确性的同时大幅减少不安全代码。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法要么产生不安全输出，要么在函数级别翻译时无法处理跨单元类型不匹配或需要全局推理的不安全构造。函数级LLM管道在类型签名改变时需要协调调用者更新，而项目级系统在真实依赖复杂性下经常无法产生可编译输出。

Method: 两阶段管道：第一阶段（封装替换）使用ABI保持的包装模式，将每个函数分成调用者透明的shim和安全的内部函数，允许独立类型更改和自动回滚；第二阶段（代理精炼）使用LLM代理在整个代码库范围内解决跨函数的不安全构造。

Result: 在7个GNU Coreutils程序和8个Laertes基准库上评估，显示所有15个程序的不安全构造显著减少，同时保持完整的测试向量正确性。

Conclusion: Encrust通过解耦边界适应和函数逻辑，结合ABI保持的包装和代理精炼，成功实现了安全、可编译的C-to-Rust翻译，解决了现有方法的局限性。

Abstract: We present Encapsulated Substitution and Agentic Refinement on a Live Scaffold for Safe C-to-Rust Translation, a two-phase pipeline for translating real-world C projects to safe Rust. Existing approaches either produce unsafe output without memory-safety guarantees or translate functions in isolation, failing to detect cross-unit type mismatches or handle unsafe constructs requiring whole-program reasoning. Furthermore, function-level LLM pipelines require coordinated caller updates when type signatures change, while project-scale systems often fail to produce compilable output under real-world dependency complexity. Encrust addresses these limitations by decoupling boundary adaptation from function logic via an Application Binary Interface (ABI)-preserving wrapper pattern and validating each intermediate state against the integrated codebase. Phase 1 (Encapsulated Substitution) translates each function using an ABI-preserving wrapper that splits it into two components: a caller-transparent shim retaining the original raw-pointer signature, and a safe inner function targeted by the LLM with a clean, scope-limited prompt. This enables independent per-function type changes with automatic rollback on failure, without coordinated caller updates. A deterministic, type-directed wrapper elimination pass then removes wrappers after successful translation. Phase 2 (Agentic Refinement) resolves unsafe constructs beyond per-function scope, including static mut globals, skipped wrapper pairs, and failed translations, using an LLM agent operating on the whole codebase under a baseline-aware verification gate. We evaluate Encrust on 7 GNU Coreutils programs and 8 libraries from the Laertes benchmark, showing substantial unsafe-construct reduction across all 15 programs while maintaining full test-vector correctness.

</details>


### [425] [Beyond Fixed Tests: Repository-Level Issue Resolution as Coevolution of Code and Behavioral Constraints](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04580)
*Kefan Li,Yuan Yuan,Mengfei Wang,Shihao Zheng,Wei Wang,Ping Yang,Mu Li,Weifeng Lv*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: Agent-CoEvo：一种协同进化的多智能体框架，通过联合探索和迭代精化代码补丁和测试补丁来解决仓库级问题，将测试视为动态约束而非固定预言机。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM修复系统采用线性管道，将测试作为后验过滤器，将行为约束视为固定不变。这导致修复过程简化为在静态且可能错位的约束下优化代码，产生欠约束搜索和脆弱或过拟合的修复。而实际软件工程师在解决仓库级问题时，会迭代精化代码和测试。

Method: 提出Agent-CoEvo协同进化多智能体框架，候选代码补丁和测试补丁被联合探索和迭代精化。通过相互评估和语义重组，代码和测试候选逐步缩小与问题描述一致的行为空间。

Result: 在SWE-bench Lite和SWT-bench Lite上评估，Agent-CoEvo在修复成功率和测试重现质量方面始终优于最先进的基于智能体和无智能体基线。

Conclusion: 修复智能体在搜索过程中能够修订行为约束对于可靠的问题解决至关重要，这指向从仅代码优化向实现和规范协同进化的转变。

Abstract: Software engineers resolving repository-level issues do not treat existing tests as immutable correctness oracles. Instead, they iteratively refine both code and the tests used to characterize intended behavior, as new modifications expose missing assumptions or misinterpreted failure conditions. In contrast, most existing large language model (LLM)-based repair systems adopt a linear pipeline in which tests or other validation signals act mostly as post-hoc filters, treating behavioral constraints as fixed during repair. This formulation reduces repair to optimizing code under static and potentially misaligned constraints, leading to under-constrained search and brittle or overfitted fixes. We argue that repository-level issue resolution is fundamentally not optimization under fixed tests, but search over evolving behavioral constraints. To operationalize this view, we propose Agent-CoEvo, a coevolutionary multi-agent framework in which candidate code patches and test patches are jointly explored and iteratively refined. Rather than treating tests as immutable oracles, our framework models them as dynamic constraints that both guide and are revised by the repair process. Through mutual evaluation and semantic recombination, code and test candidates progressively narrow the space of behavior consistent with the issue description. Evaluated on SWE-bench Lite and SWT-bench Lite, Agent-CoEvo consistently outperforms state-of-the-art agent-based and agentless baselines in both repair success and test reproduction quality. Our findings suggest that enabling repair agents to revise behavioral constraints during search is critical for reliable issue resolution, pointing toward a shift from code-only optimization to coevolution of implementation and specification.

</details>


### [426] [MIRAGE: Online LLM Simulation for Microservice Dependency Testing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04806)
*XinRan Zhang*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 论文提出MIRAGE系统，使用LLM在线模拟微服务依赖，无需预生成模拟规范，在测试运行时动态响应依赖请求，保持跨请求状态，相比传统方法显著提升保真度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有微服务依赖模拟方法（记录-回放、模式挖掘、规范驱动存根）在测试执行前生成静态工件，无法适应运行时动态变化，保真度有限。需要一种能在测试运行时动态模拟依赖行为的方法。

Method: 提出在线LLM模拟方法：LLM在运行时直接响应每个依赖请求，读取依赖源代码、调用者代码和生产跟踪数据，按需模拟依赖行为，维护跨请求状态。实现为MIRAGE系统，无需预生成模拟规范。

Result: 在110个测试场景中，白盒模式下MIRAGE达到99%状态码保真度和99%响应形状保真度，远高于记录-回放的62%/16%。端到端集成测试产生与真实依赖相同的通过/失败结果。依赖源代码通常足够实现高保真度运行时模拟（100%单独使用）。

Conclusion: 在线LLM模拟方法显著优于传统静态模拟技术，能够实现高保真度的微服务依赖模拟。运行时方法的隐式状态跟踪对复杂有状态服务的行为复杂性很重要。该方法在不同LLM家族中表现稳定，成本可控。

Abstract: Existing approaches to microservice dependency simulation--record-replay, pattern-mining, and specification-driven stubs--generate static artifacts before test execution. We propose online LLM simulation, a runtime approach where the LLM directly answers each dependency request as it arrives, maintaining cross-request state throughout a test scenario. No mock specification is pre-generated; the model reads the dependency's source code, caller code, and production traces, then simulates dependency behavior on demand. We instantiate this approach in MIRAGE and evaluate it on 110 test scenarios spanning 14 caller-dependency pairs across three microservice systems (Google's Online Boutique, Weaveworks' Sock Shop, and a custom system). In white-box mode (dependency source available), MIRAGE achieves 99% status-code fidelity (109/110) and 99% response-shape fidelity, compared to 62% / 16% for record-replay. End-to-end, caller integration tests produce the same pass/fail outcomes with MIRAGE as with real dependencies (8/8 scenarios). A signal ablation shows dependency source code is often sufficient for high-fidelity runtime simulation (100% alone); without it, the model still infers correct error codes (94%) but loses response-structure accuracy (75%). Constraining LLM output through typed intermediate representations reduces fidelity on complex stateful services (55%) while performing adequately on simple APIs (86%), suggesting that the runtime approach's implicit state tracking matters for behavioral complexity. Results are stable across three LLM families (within 3%) at $0.16--$0.82 per dependency.

</details>


### [427] [A Validated Taxonomy on Software Energy Smells](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04809)
*Mohammadjavad Mehditabar,Saurabhsingh Rajput,Tushar Sharma*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 提出首个全面的语言无关软件能耗异味分类法，通过系统文献综述识别12种主要异味和65个根本原因，并用21,000个Python代码对进行实证验证，发现71%样本存在多种异味共存，内存相关异味修复节能效果最佳。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着软件在各领域普及，其总体能耗已成为重要问题。现有能耗异味分类存在局限性：要么是领域特定的，要么仅限于性能反模式，缺乏细粒度根本原因分类，或未用实测能耗数据验证。需要建立全面、语言无关、经验证的能耗异味分类法来帮助开发者识别和重构低效能代码。

Method: 1. 通过系统文献综述60篇论文和滚雪球方法，编码320个低效模式为12种主要能耗异味和65个根本原因；2. 实证验证：分析21,000个功能等效的Python代码对，测量能耗、时间和内存；3. 使用多步骤LLM管道对能耗差异最大的3000对代码进行分类，将65个根本原因中的55个映射到实际代码。

Result: 1. 71%的样本表现出多种异味共存现象；2. 内存相关异味每次修复的节能效果最高；3. 不同模式的功耗变化证实能耗优化不能简化为性能优化；4. 成功将65个根本原因中的55个映射到实际代码，验证了分类法的实用性。

Conclusion: 提出了首个全面、语言无关、经验证的软件能耗异味分类法，为能耗异味检测、节能代码生成和绿色软件工程提供了共享词汇表、可操作的重构指南和实证基础。发布的标注数据集包括能耗分析和推理轨迹，支持社区进一步研究。

Abstract: As software proliferates across domains, its aggregate energy footprint has become a major concern. To reduce software's growing environmental footprint, developers need to identify and refactor energy smells: source code implementations, design choices, or programming practices that lead to inefficient use of computing resources. Existing catalogs of such smells are either domain-specific, limited to performance anti-patterns, lack fine-grained root cause classification, or remain unvalidated against measured energy data. In this paper, we present a comprehensive, language-agnostic, taxonomy of software energy smells. Through a systematic literature review of 60 papers and exhaustive snowballing, we coded 320 inefficiency patterns into 12 primary energy smells and 65 root causes mapped to the primary smells. To empirically validate this taxonomy, we profile over 21,000 functionally equivalent Python code pairs for energy, time, and memory, and classified the top 3000 pairs by energy difference using a multi-step LLM pipeline, mapping 55 of the 65 root causes to real code. The analysis reveals that 71% of samples exhibit multiple co-occurring smells, memory-related smells yield the highest per-fix energy savings, while power draw variation across patterns confirms that energy optimization cannot be reduced to performance optimization alone. Along with the taxonomy, we release the labeled dataset, including energy profiles and reasoning traces, to the community. Together, they provide a shared vocabulary, actionable refactoring guidelines, and an empirical foundation for energy smell detection, energy-efficient code generation, and green software engineering at large.

</details>


### [428] [SysTradeBench: An Iterative Build-Test-Patch Benchmark for Strategy-to-Code Trading Systems with Drift-Aware Diagnostics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04812)
*Yuchen Cao,Hanlin Zhang,Jacky Wai Keung,Yang Chen,Linqi Song*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: SysTradeBench (SysTB) 是一个用于评估LLM生成交易系统的基准测试，通过迭代构建-测试-修补流程，在多维度上评估策略到代码的转换质量，强调可审计性和风险管理。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有评估主要关注静态金融知识或单一盈利能力指标，缺乏对策略到代码交易系统作为受监管、可审计软件的基准测试，需要填补这一空白。

Method: 提出SysTradeBench基准测试，采用迭代构建-测试-修补方法：给定标准基础策略文档，模型需生成策略卡、可执行代码和强制审计日志；沙盒环境运行确定性检查、防泄漏检测、规则漂移检测，并返回证据包支持约束性修补。

Result: 评估了17个模型在12种策略上的表现：顶级模型有效性超过91.7%，具有强聚合分数，但证据驱动的迭代在第二次迭代时导致代码收敛；LLM擅长快速原型设计和浅层错误修复，但人类监督对于需要解决方案多样性和集成鲁棒性的关键策略仍然至关重要。

Conclusion: LLM迭代补充而非替代人类量化研究员治理：LLM在快速原型设计和浅层错误修复方面表现出色，而人类监督对于需要解决方案多样性和集成鲁棒性的关键策略仍然必不可少。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used as quantitative research copilots to translate natural-language strategy specifications into executable trading code. Yet most existing evaluations either focus on static financial knowledge or summarize performance with a single profitability metric, leaving a gap for benchmarking strategy-to-code trading systems as governed, auditable software. We introduce SysTradeBench (SysTB), an iterative build-test-patch benchmark that evaluates LLM-generated trading systems under drift-aware diagnostics. Given a standardized Base Strategy Doc and frozen semantics, each model must produce (i) a strategy card, (ii) executable code, and (iii) mandatory audit logs. A sandboxed harness runs determinism and anti-leakage checks, detects rule drift across iterations, and returns evidence bundles to support constrained patches. SysTradeBench reports multi-dimensional scorecards for spec fidelity, risk discipline, reliability, and out-of-sample robustness indicators, together with cost-effectiveness signals. We evaluate 17 models across 12 strategies. Top models achieve validity above 91.7 percent with strong aggregate scores, but evidence-driven iteration also induces code convergence by Iter2. These findings suggest that LLM iteration complements rather than replaces human quantitative researcher governance: LLMs excel at rapid prototyping and shallow bug fixes, while human oversight remains essential for critical strategies requiring solution diversity and ensemble robustness.

</details>


### [429] [Assessing Large Language Models for Stabilizing Numerical Expression in Scientific Software](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04854)
*Tien Nguyen,Muhammad Ali Gulzar,Kirshanthan Sundararajah*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: LLMs在检测和稳定数值计算方面与传统方法相当，在传统方法失败的17.4%情况下能成功稳定97.9%的表达式，但在控制流和高精度字面值处理上存在困难。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 科学软件依赖高精度计算，但浮点表示会引入精度误差。尽管LLMs在科学应用中日益普及，但其处理浮点数值稳定性的可靠性尚未得到系统评估。

Method: 通过两个数值稳定任务评估LLMs：1) 检测数值表达式的不稳定性（生成引发错误的输入）；2) 重写表达式以提高数值稳定性。使用流行的数值基准测试，评估6个LLM在近2,470个数值结构上的表现。

Result: LLMs在检测和稳定数值不稳定计算方面与传统方法同样有效。在基线方法无法提高准确性的17.4%表达式中，LLMs成功稳定了其中97.9%。在65.4%的所有表达式中，LLMs实现了比基线更好的稳定性。但LLMs在处理控制流和高精度字面值时表现不佳，倾向于移除这些结构而非推理其数值含义。

Conclusion: LLMs能有效稳定传统技术无法处理的表达式，但在需要精确推理具体数值大小和控制流语义时存在困难，因为这些具体模式在训练中很少遇到。

Abstract: Scientific software relies on high-precision computation, yet finite floating-point representations can introduce precision errors that propagate in safety-critical domains. Despite the growing use of large language models (LLMs) in scientific applications, their reliability in handling floating-point numerical stability has not been systematically evaluated. This paper evaluates LLMs' reasoning on high-precision numerical computation through two numerical stabilization tasks: (1) detecting instability in numerical expressions by generating error-inducing inputs (detection), and (2) rewriting expressions to improve numerical stability (stabilization). Using popular numerical benchmarks, we assess six LLMs on nearly 2,470 numerical structures, including nested conditionals, high-precision literals, and multi-variable arithmetic.
  Our results show that LLMs are equally effective as state-of-the-art traditional approaches in detecting and stabilizing numerically unstable computations. More notably, LLMs outperform baseline methods precisely where the latter fail: in 17.4% (431) of expressions where the baseline does not improve accuracy, LLMs successfully stabilize 422 (97.9%) of them, and achieve greater stability than the baseline across 65.4% (1,615) of all expressions. However, LLMs struggle with control flow and high-precision literals, consistently removing such structures rather than reasoning about their numerical implications, whereas they perform substantially better on purely symbolic expressions. Together, these findings suggest that LLMs are effective at stabilizing expressions that classical techniques cannot, yet struggle when exact numerical magnitudes and control flow semantics must be precisely reasoned about, as such concrete patterns are rarely encountered during training.

</details>


### [430] [StatsClaw: An AI-Collaborative Workflow for Statistical Software Development](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04871)
*Tianzhu Qin,Yiqing Xu*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: StatsClaw是一个多智能体架构，通过信息隔离确保统计软件的正确实现，将代码生成与验证分离


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 将统计方法转化为可靠软件是定量研究的瓶颈，现有AI代码生成工具无法保证忠实实现，而这对统计软件至关重要

Method: 引入StatsClaw多智能体架构，通过规划智能体生成独立的实现、模拟和测试规范，分派给互不可见的构建者、模拟者和测试者智能体

Result: 在probit估计包上进行了端到端演示，并在作者自己的R和Python包上进行了三个应用评估，证明结构化AI辅助工作流能吸收软件生命周期工程开销

Conclusion: 结构化AI辅助工作流可以在保持研究人员对每个实质性方法决策控制的同时，吸收软件生命周期的工程开销

Abstract: Translating statistical methods into reliable software is a persistent bottleneck in quantitative research. Existing AI code-generation tools produce code quickly but cannot guarantee faithful implementation -- a critical requirement for statistical software. We introduce StatsClaw, a multi-agent architecture for Claude Code that enforces information barriers between code generation and validation. A planning agent produces independent specifications for implementation, simulation, and testing, dispatching them to separate agents that cannot see each other's instructions: the builder implements without knowing the ground-truth parameters, the simulator generates data without knowing the algorithm, and the tester validates using deterministic criteria. We describe the approach, demonstrate it end-to-end on a probit estimation package, and evaluate it across three applications to the authors' own R and Python packages. The results show that structured AI-assisted workflows can absorb the engineering overhead of the software lifecycle while preserving researcher control over every substantive methodological decision.

</details>


<div id='cs.IR'></div>

# cs.IR [[Back]](#toc)

### [431] [BridgeRAG: Training-Free Bridge-Conditioned Retrieval for Multi-Hop Question Answering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.03384)
*Andre Bacellar*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: BridgeRAG：一种无需训练、无需图结构的检索增强生成方法，通过桥接条件化的LLM评分器解决多跳检索问题，在多个标准MHQA基准上取得最佳性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多跳检索不是单步相关性匹配问题，后续跳的证据应该基于检索到的桥接证据进行条件化评估，而不仅仅是与原始查询的相似性。现有方法未能充分捕捉这种条件化关系。

Method: 提出BridgeRAG方法：1）使用双实体ANN扩展扩大第二跳候选池；2）引入桥接条件化的LLM评分器s(q,b,c)来识别活跃推理链；3）结合轻量级覆盖扩展和百分位排名分数融合，无需离线图或命题索引。

Result: 在三个标准MHQA基准上取得最佳训练免费性能：MuSiQue达到0.8146（比PropRAG高3.1pp），2WikiMultiHopQA达到0.9527（高1.2pp），HotpotQA达到0.9875（高1.35pp）。实验证明桥接条件化具有选择性、不可替代性、可预测性和机制精确性。

Conclusion: BridgeRAG通过将覆盖与评分分离，并引入桥接条件化的LLM评分器，有效解决了多跳检索中的条件化评估问题，在无需训练或图结构的情况下实现了最先进的性能。

Abstract: Multi-hop retrieval is not a single-step relevance problem: later-hop evidence should be ranked by its utility conditioned on retrieved bridge evidence, not by similarity to the original query alone. We present BridgeRAG, a training-free, graph-free retrieval method for retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) over multi-hop questions that operationalizes this view with a tripartite scorer s(q,b,c) over (question, bridge, candidate). BridgeRAG separates coverage from scoring: dual-entity ANN expansion broadens the second-hop candidate pool, while a bridge-conditioned LLM judge identifies the active reasoning chain among competing candidates without any offline graph or proposition index. Across four controlled experiments we show that this conditioning signal is (i) selective: +2.55pp on parallel-chain queries (p<0.001) vs. ~0 on single-chain subtypes; (ii) irreplaceable: substituting the retrieved passage with generated SVO query text reduces R@5 by 2.1pp, performing worse than even the lowest-SVO-similarity pool passage; (iii) predictable: cos(b,g2) correlates with per-query gain (Spearman rho=0.104, p<0.001); and (iv) mechanistically precise: bridge conditioning causes productive re-rankings (18.7% flip-win rate on parallel-chain vs. 0.6% on single-chain), not merely more churn. Combined with lightweight coverage expansion and percentile-rank score fusion, BridgeRAG achieves the best published training-free R@5 under matched benchmark evaluation on all three standard MHQA benchmarks without a graph database or any training: 0.8146 on MuSiQue (+3.1pp vs. PropRAG, +6.8pp vs. HippoRAG2), 0.9527 on 2WikiMultiHopQA (+1.2pp vs. PropRAG), and 0.9875 on HotpotQA (+1.35pp vs. PropRAG).

</details>


### [432] [Align then Train: Efficient Retrieval Adapter Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.03403)
*Seiji Maekawa,Moin Aminnaseri,Pouya Pezeshkpour,Estevam Hruschka*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: ERA框架通过两阶段训练检索适配器，在保持轻量级文档编码器的同时，利用大型查询编码器处理复杂查询，无需重新索引文档库。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现实检索场景中，用户通过长指令或任务描述表达复杂意图，而目标文档相对简单静态。这种不对称导致检索不匹配：理解查询需要强推理和指令跟随能力，而高效文档索引需要轻量编码器。现有方法通常直接改进嵌入模型，但微调大型嵌入模型计算成本高、内存密集且操作负担重。

Method: 提出高效检索适配器(ERA)框架，包含两个训练阶段：1) 自监督对齐：对齐大型查询编码器和轻量文档编码器的嵌入空间；2) 监督适应：使用有限标注数据调整查询侧表示。该方法无需重新索引文档库，就能弥合嵌入模型间的表示差距以及复杂查询与简单文档间的语义差距。

Result: 在MAIR基准测试（涵盖6个领域的126个检索任务）上，ERA在低标注设置下改进了检索性能，优于依赖大量标注数据的方法，并能有效跨领域结合更强的查询编码器和更弱的文档编码器。

Conclusion: ERA提供了一种标签高效的解决方案，通过两阶段适配器训练，在保持轻量级文档索引的同时，利用大型查询编码器处理复杂查询，解决了检索中的不对称问题，且无需重新索引文档库。

Abstract: Dense retrieval systems increasingly need to handle complex queries. In many realistic settings, users express intent through long instructions or task-specific descriptions, while target documents remain relatively simple and static. This asymmetry creates a retrieval mismatch: understanding queries may require strong reasoning and instruction-following, whereas efficient document indexing favors lightweight encoders. Existing retrieval systems often address this mismatch by directly improving the embedding model, but fine-tuning large embedding models to better follow such instructions is computationally expensive, memory-intensive, and operationally burdensome. To address this challenge, we propose Efficient Retrieval Adapter (ERA), a label-efficient framework that trains retrieval adapters in two stages: self-supervised alignment and supervised adaptation. Inspired by the pre-training and supervised fine-tuning stages of LLMs, ERA first aligns the embedding spaces of a large query embedder and a lightweight document embedder, and then uses limited labeled data to adapt the query-side representation, bridging both the representation gap between embedding models and the semantic gap between complex queries and simple documents without re-indexing the corpus. Experiments on the MAIR benchmark, spanning 126 retrieval tasks across 6 domains, show that ERA improves retrieval in low-label settings, outperforms methods that rely on larger amounts of labeled data, and effectively combines stronger query embedders with weaker document embedders across domains.

</details>


### [433] [Lightweight Query Routing for Adaptive RAG: A Baseline Study on RAGRouter-Bench](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.03455)
*Prakhar Bansal,Shivangi Agarwal*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文首次在RAGRouter-Bench基准上系统评估轻量级分类器路由，TF-IDF+SVM组合达到0.928宏平均F1和93.2%准确率，相比最昂贵策略节省28.1%token，发现词汇特征优于语义嵌入。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: RAG检索策略在token成本和能力上差异很大，为查询选择合适策略是实际效率问题。虽然已有RAGRouter-Bench基准包含7,727个查询和三种查询类型标注，但尚未有路由分类器在该基准上训练和评估。

Method: 在RAGRouter-Bench基准上系统评估轻量级分类器路由。评估五种经典分类器在三种特征体系下：TF-IDF、MiniLM句子嵌入和手工构建的结构特征，共15种分类器-特征组合。使用宏平均F1和准确率作为评估指标。

Result: 最佳配置TF-IDF+SVM达到0.928宏平均F1和93.2%准确率，相比始终使用最昂贵策略模拟节省28.1%token。词汇TF-IDF特征比语义句子嵌入高出3.1宏F1点。领域分析显示医疗查询最难路由，法律查询最易处理。

Conclusion: 研究建立了可复现的查询侧基线，表明词汇特征能有效预测查询类型复杂度，同时揭示了语料感知路由需要弥补的差距。医疗领域路由挑战最大，为后续研究提供了明确方向。

Abstract: Retrieval-Augmented Generation pipelines span a wide range of retrieval strategies that differ substantially in token cost and capability. Selecting the right strategy per query is a practical efficiency problem, yet no routing classifiers have been trained on RAGRouter-Bench \citep{wang2026ragrouterbench}, a recently released benchmark of $7,727$ queries spanning four knowledge domains, each annotated with one of three canonical query types: factual, reasoning, and summarization. We present the first systematic evaluation of lightweight classifier-based routing on this benchmark. Five classical classifiers are evaluated under three feature regimes, namely, TF-IDF, MiniLM sentence embeddings \citep{reimers2019sbert}, and hand-crafted structural features, yielding 15 classifier feature combinations. Our best configuration, TF-IDF with an SVM, achieves a macro-averaged F1 of $\mathbf{0.928}$ and an accuracy of $\mathbf{93.2\%}$, while simulating $\mathbf{28.1\%}$ token savings relative to always using the most expensive paradigm. Lexical TF-IDF features outperform semantic sentence embeddings by $3.1$ macro-F1 points, suggesting that surface keyword patterns are strong predictors of query-type complexity. Domain-level analysis reveals that medical queries are hardest to route and legal queries most tractable. These results establish a reproducible query-side baseline and highlight the gap that corpus-aware routing must close.

</details>


### [434] [LLM-based Listwise Reranking under the Effect of Positional Bias](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.03642)
*Jingfen Qiao,Jin Huang,Xinyu Ma,Shuaiqiang Wang,Dawei Yin,Evangelos Kanoulas,Andrew Yates*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 提出DebiasFirst方法，通过位置校准和位置感知数据增强来缓解LLM列表式文档重排序中的位置偏差问题


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM列表式文档重排序存在位置偏差问题，即位于输入末尾的文档难以被排到前列。作者假设位置偏差有两个主要来源：(1) LLM固有的架构偏差，(2) 相关文档位置分布不均衡

Method: 提出DebiasFirst方法，包含两个核心组件：1) 位置校准：使用逆倾向评分调整损失函数中不同位置的贡献权重；2) 位置感知数据增强：增强训练数据，确保每个文档在输入列表中出现在不同位置

Result: DebiasFirst显著提高了重排序的有效性和鲁棒性，减少了NDCG@10性能对相关文档位置的依赖，且能补充推理阶段的去偏方法

Conclusion: DebiasFirst为缓解重排序中的位置偏差提供了实用解决方案，通过训练阶段的去偏方法提升LLM重排序性能

Abstract: LLM-based listwise passage reranking has attracted attention for its effectiveness in ranking candidate passages. However, these models suffer from positional bias, where passages positioned towards the end of the input are less likely to be moved to top positions in the ranking. We hypothesize that there are two primary sources of positional bias: (1) architectural bias inherent in LLMs and (2) the imbalanced positioning of relevant documents. To address this, we propose DebiasFirst, a method that integrates positional calibration and position-aware data augmentation during fine-tuning. Positional calibration uses inverse propensity scoring to adjust for positional bias by re-weighting the contributions of different positions in the loss function when training. Position-aware augmentation augments training data to ensure that each passage appears equally across varied positions in the input list. This approach markedly enhances both effectiveness and robustness to the original ranking across diverse first-stage retrievers, reducing the dependence of NDCG@10 performance on the position of relevant documents. DebiasFirst also complements the inference-stage debiasing methods, offering a practical solution for mitigating positional bias in reranking.

</details>


### [435] [Joint Behavior-guided and Modality-coherence Conditional Graph Diffusion Denoising for Multi Modal Recommendation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.03654)
*Xiangchen Pan,Wei Wei*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: JBM-Diff：一种联合行为引导和模态一致的条件图扩散模型，用于多模态推荐中的特征和反馈联合去噪


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多模态推荐面临两个关键挑战：1）多模态特征中存在大量与用户偏好无关的冗余信息，直接注入会影响用户-物品的协同特征学习；2）系统错误导致的假阴性和假阳性行为（如误点击、未曝光）会影响训练样本对的排序准确性

Method: 提出JBM-Diff模型：1）为每个模态特征设计基于协同特征的条件扩散模型，去除偏好无关信息；2）通过多视图消息传播和特征融合增强协同特征与模态语义信息的对齐；3）基于学习的模态偏好从行为角度检测样本对的偏序一致性，设置可信度，实现数据增强

Result: 在三个公共数据集上的广泛实验证明了该方法的有效性

Conclusion: JBM-Diff通过联合去噪多模态特征和用户反馈，有效解决了多模态推荐中的冗余信息和反馈偏差问题，提高了推荐准确性

Abstract: In recent years, multimodal recommendation has received significant attention and achieved remarkable success in GCN-based recommendation methods. However, there are two key challenges here: (1) There is a significant amount of redundant information in multimodal features that is unrelated to user preferences. Directly injecting multimodal features into the interaction graph can affect the collaborative feature learning between users and items. (2) There are false negative and false positive behaviors caused by system errors such as accidental clicks and non-exposure. This feedback bias can affect the ranking accuracy of training sample pairs, thereby reducing the recommendation accuracy of the model.
  To address these challenges, this work proposes a Joint Behavior-guided and Modal-consistent Conditional Graph Diffusion Model (JBM-Diff) for joint denoising of multimodal features and user feedback. We design a diffusion model conditioned on collaborative features for each modal feature to remove preference-irrelevant information, and enhance the alignment between collaborative features and modal semantic information through multi-view message propagation and feature fusion. Finally, we detect the partial order consistency of sample pairs from a behavioral perspective based on learned modal preferences, set the credibility for sample pairs, and achieve data augmentation. Extensive experiments on three public datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of this work. Codes are available at https://github.com/pxcstart/JBMDiff.

</details>


### [436] [MMP-Refer: Multimodal Path Retrieval-augmented LLMs For Explainable Recommendation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.03666)
*Xiangchen Pan,Wei Wei*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: MMP-Refer是一个基于多模态检索路径和检索增强LLM的可解释推荐框架，通过多模态嵌入和启发式搜索获取检索路径，并利用轻量级协作适配器增强LLM对交互信息的理解。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于LLM的可解释推荐方法通常引入协作信息来增强个性化，但忽略了推荐数据集中的多模态信息；同时，协作信息需要与LLM的语义空间对齐。现有的检索路径收集方案大多使用现有的可解释GNN算法，这些方法虽然有效，但可解释性相对不足，且不太适合推荐领域。

Method: 1. 使用基于联合残差编码的顺序推荐模型获取多模态嵌入；2. 设计启发式搜索算法通过多模态嵌入获取检索路径；3. 在生成阶段集成可训练的轻量级协作适配器，将交互子图的图编码映射到LLM的语义空间，作为软提示来增强LLM对交互信息的理解。

Result: 大量实验证明了该方法的有效性。代码和数据已在GitHub上开源。

Conclusion: MMP-Refer框架通过结合多模态检索路径和检索增强LLM，有效解决了现有可解释推荐方法在多模态信息利用和协作信息对齐方面的不足，提高了推荐系统的可解释性和性能。

Abstract: Explainable recommendations help improve the transparency and credibility of recommendation systems, and play an important role in personalized recommendation scenarios. At present, methods for explainable recommendation based on large language models(LLMs) often consider introducing collaborative information to enhance the personalization and accuracy of the model, but ignore the multimodal information in the recommendation dataset; In addition, collaborative information needs to be aligned with the semantic space of LLM. Introducing collaborative signals through retrieval paths is a good choice, but most of the existing retrieval path collection schemes use the existing Explainable GNN algorithms. Although these methods are effective, they are relatively unexplainable and not be suitable for the recommendation field.
  To address the above challenges, we propose MMP-Refer, a framework using \textbf{M}ulti\textbf{M}odal Retrieval \textbf{P}aths with \textbf{Re}trieval-augmented LLM \textbf{F}or \textbf{E}xplainable \textbf{R}ecommendation. We use a sequential recommendation model based on joint residual coding to obtain multimodal embeddings, and design a heuristic search algorithm to obtain retrieval paths by multimodal embeddings; In the generation phase, we integrated a trainable lightweight collaborative adapter to map the graph encoding of interaction subgraphs to the semantic space of the LLM, as soft prompts to enhance the understanding of interaction information by the LLM. Extensive experiments have demonstrated the effectiveness of our approach. Codes and data are available at https://github.com/pxcstart/MMP-Refer.

</details>


### [437] [User Simulator-Guided Multi-Turn Preference Optimization for Reasoning LLM-based Conversational Recommendation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.03671)
*Xingyuan Xiang,Xiangchen Pan,Wei Wei*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: SMTPO是一个用户模拟器引导的多轮偏好优化对话推荐框架，通过多任务监督微调和强化学习解决模拟反馈偏差问题，提升推荐性能


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 对话推荐系统面临信息稀缺对话历史和单轮推荐范式的限制，难以准确建模复杂用户偏好。现有LLM用户模拟器在推理时无法访问真实用户偏好标签，导致反馈偏离真实兴趣，误差在多轮交互中累积，严重影响推荐器泛化能力

Method: 提出SMTPO框架：1) 通过多任务监督微调增强模拟器反馈质量，使其更好反映用户复杂需求；2) 先让基于推理LLM的推荐器通过SFT学习偏好推理和推荐模式，然后采用强化学习与细粒度奖励设计，逐步对齐真实用户偏好

Result: 在公开数据集上的广泛实验证明了方法的有效性和可迁移性

Conclusion: SMTPO通过结合多任务SFT和强化学习，有效解决了用户模拟器反馈偏差问题，提升了多轮对话推荐系统的性能

Abstract: Conversational Recommender Systems (CRSs) leverage natural language interactions for personalized recommendation, yet information-scarce dialogue histories and single-turn recommendation paradigms may severely hinder accurate modeling of complex user preferences. To alleviate this issue, recent studies have introduced LLM-based user simulators, which generate natural language feedback and perform simulated multi-turn interactions to assist recommendation. Nevertheless, since simulators cannot access true user preference labels during inference, their feedback may deviate from actual user interests, causing errors to accumulate over multiple interactions and severely affecting the generalization of the recommender. Inspired by the multi-step reasoning capabilities of LLMs and the effectiveness of reinforcement learning in policy optimization, we propose SMTPO, a user simulator-guided multi-turn preference optimization conversational recommendation framework. To align simulator-generated feedback with true user preferences in the absence of explicit labels, we enhance feedback quality via multi-task supervised fine-tuning (SFT), enabling the simulator to better reflect users' complex and diverse needs. To address the challenge of biased feedback destabilizing multi-turn optimization, we first allow the reasoning LLM-based recommender to learn preference reasoning and recommendation patterns through SFT and then employ reinforcement learning with fine-grained reward design to progressively align with true user preferences, improving recommendation performance. Extensive experiments on public datasets demonstrate the effectiveness and transferability of our method.

</details>


### [438] [Are LLM-Based Retrievers Worth Their Cost? An Empirical Study of Efficiency, Robustness, and Reasoning Overhead](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.03676)
*Abdelrahman Abdallah,Jamie Holdcroft,Mohammed Ali,Adam Jatowt*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 该论文对12个推理密集型检索任务上的14种检索器进行了全面评估，不仅关注准确性，还考察了效率、鲁棒性和置信度校准等实用指标，发现推理增强对小型编码器有效但收益递减，且现有检索器的置信度校准普遍较弱。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大型语言模型检索器在复杂查询上表现良好，但其实际价值不仅取决于准确性，还需要考虑效率、鲁棒性和可靠的置信度信号。现有评估主要关注准确性，缺乏对实用指标的全面分析。

Method: 在12个推理密集型检索任务上复现BRIGHT基准，评估14种检索器，扩展评估指标包括冷启动索引成本、查询延迟分布和吞吐量、语料库扩展、对受控查询扰动的鲁棒性，以及置信度使用（AUROC）来预测查询成功。还量化了推理开销，比较标准查询与五个推理增强变体。

Result: 一些推理专用检索器在保持高吞吐量的同时实现了强有效性，而几个基于大型LLM的双编码器以显著延迟换取有限增益。推理增强对小于10亿参数的编码器延迟最小，但对顶级检索器收益递减，在形式数学/代码领域可能降低性能。置信度校准在所有模型家族中普遍较弱。

Conclusion: 检索器的实际部署需要综合考虑准确性、效率和鲁棒性。推理增强策略需根据模型规模和领域特性谨慎选择。现有检索器的置信度校准不足，原始检索分数不可靠，需要额外的校准才能用于下游路由决策。

Abstract: Large language model retrievers improve performance on complex queries, but their practical value depends on efficiency, robustness, and reliable confidence signals in addition to accuracy. We reproduce a reasoning-intensive retrieval benchmark (BRIGHT) across 12 tasks and 14 retrievers, and extend evaluation with cold-start indexing cost, query latency distributions and throughput, corpus scaling, robustness to controlled query perturbations, and confidence use (AUROC) for predicting query success. We also quantify \emph{reasoning overhead} by comparing standard queries to five provided reasoning-augmented variants, measuring accuracy gains relative to added latency. We find that some reasoning-specialized retrievers achieve strong effectiveness while remaining competitive in throughput, whereas several large LLM-based bi-encoders incur substantial latency for modest gains. Reasoning augmentation incurs minimal latency for sub-1B encoders but exhibits diminishing returns for top retrievers and may reduce performance on formal math/code domains. Confidence calibration is consistently weak across model families, indicating that raw retrieval scores are unreliable for downstream routing without additional calibration. We release all code and artifacts for reproducibility.

</details>


### [439] [Fusion and Alignment Enhancement with Large Language Models for Tail-item Sequential Recommendation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.03688)
*Zhifu Wei,Yizhou Dang,Guibing Guo,Chuang Zhao,Zhu Sun*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: FAERec框架通过自适应门控机制融合ID与LLM嵌入，采用双重对齐解决结构不一致问题，提升尾部物品序列推荐性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 序列推荐中尾部物品交互稀疏问题限制了模型捕捉物品转移模式的能力。现有方法在融合协同信号与语义知识方面效果不佳，且忽视了ID与LLM嵌入空间的结构不一致性，导致推荐准确性下降。

Method: 提出FAERec框架：1) 自适应门控机制动态融合ID与LLM嵌入；2) 双重对齐方法：物品级对齐通过对比学习建立相同物品ID与LLM嵌入的对应关系，特征级对齐约束两个嵌入空间对应维度间的相关性模式；3) 使用课程学习调度器调整两个对齐的权重，避免复杂特征级目标的过早优化。

Result: 在三个广泛使用的数据集上，与多个代表性序列推荐骨干模型进行实验，证明了该框架的有效性和泛化能力。

Conclusion: FAERec框架通过有效融合协同信号与语义知识，并解决嵌入空间结构不一致问题，显著提升了尾部物品的序列推荐性能。

Abstract: Sequential Recommendation (SR) learns user preferences from their historical interaction sequences and provides personalized suggestions. In real-world scenarios, most items exhibit sparse interactions, known as the tail-item problem. This issue limits the model's ability to accurately capture item transition patterns. To tackle this, large language models (LLMs) offer a promising solution by capturing semantic relationships between items. Despite previous efforts to leverage LLM-derived embeddings for enriching tail items, they still face the following limitations: 1) They struggle to effectively fuse collaborative signals with semantic knowledge, leading to suboptimal item embedding quality. 2) Existing methods overlook the structural inconsistency between the ID and LLM embedding spaces, causing conflicting signals that degrade recommendation accuracy. In this work, we propose a Fusion and Alignment Enhancement framework with LLMs for Tail-item Sequential Recommendation (FAERec), which improves item representations by generating coherently-fused and structurally consistent embeddings. For the information fusion challenge, we design an adaptive gating mechanism that dynamically fuses ID and LLM embeddings. Then, we propose a dual-level alignment approach to mitigate structural inconsistency. The item-level alignment establishes correspondences between ID and LLM embeddings of the same item through contrastive learning, while the feature-level alignment constrains the correlation patterns between corresponding dimensions across the two embedding spaces. Furthermore, the weights of the two alignments are adjusted by a curriculum learning scheduler to avoid premature optimization of the complex feature-level objective. Extensive experiments across three widely used datasets with multiple representative SR backbones demonstrate the effectiveness and generalizability of our framework.

</details>


### [440] [Rank, Don't Generate: Statement-level Ranking for Explainable Recommendation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.03724)
*Ben Kabongo,Arthur Satouf,Vincent Guigue*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 该论文提出将可解释推荐重新定义为语句级排序问题，而非生成问题，以解决LLM生成解释中的幻觉问题，并建立了StaR基准进行评测。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM生成的文本解释在推荐系统中越来越普遍，但评估这些解释仍然是一个关键挑战。现有方法存在幻觉问题，且缺乏标准化的评估框架。

Method: 1) 将可解释推荐形式化为语句级排序问题，系统对从评论中提取的候选解释语句进行排序并返回前k个；2) 开发基于LLM的提取管道，生成解释性和原子性语句；3) 提出可扩展的语义聚类方法，合并同义表述以确保唯一性；4) 基于此构建StaR基准数据集。

Result: 构建了StaR基准数据集，包含四个亚马逊评论产品类别。评估显示：在全局级别排序中，基于流行度的基线方法具有竞争力；在项目级别排序中，基于流行度的基线方法平均优于最先进模型，暴露了个性化解释排序的关键局限性。

Conclusion: 将可解释推荐重新定义为排序问题而非生成问题，可以有效缓解幻觉问题，支持细粒度事实分析，并实现标准化、可重复的评估。研究揭示了当前个性化解释排序方法的不足，为未来研究提供了重要方向。

Abstract: Textual explanations, generated with large language models (LLMs), are increasingly used to justify recommendations. Yet, evaluating these explanations remains a critical challenge. We advocate a shift in objective: rank, don't generate. We formalize explainable recommendation as a statement-level ranking problem, where systems rank candidate explanatory statements derived from reviews and return the top-k as explanation. This formulation mitigates hallucination by construction and enables fine-grained factual analysis. It also models factor importance through relevance scores and supports standardized, reproducible evaluation with established ranking metrics. Meaningful assessment, however, requires each statement to be explanatory (item facts affecting user experience), atomic (one opinion about one aspect), and unique (paraphrases consolidated), which is challenging to obtain from noisy reviews. We address this with (i) an LLM-based extraction pipeline producing explanatory and atomic statements, and (ii) a scalable, semantic clustering method consolidating paraphrases to enforce uniqueness. Building on this pipeline, we introduce StaR, a benchmark for statement ranking in explainable recommendation, constructed from four Amazon Reviews 2014 product categories. We evaluate popularity-based baselines and state-of-the-art models under global-level (all statements) and item-level (target item statements) ranking. Popularity baselines are competitive in global-level ranking but outperform state-of-the-art models on average in item-level ranking, exposing critical limitations in personalized explanation ranking.

</details>


### [441] [Semantic IDs for Recommender Systems at Snapchat: Use Cases, Technical Challenges, and Design Choices](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.03949)
*Clark Mingxuan Ju,Tong Zhao,Leonardo Neves,Liam Collins,Bhuvesh Kumar,Jiwen Ren,Lili Zhang,Wenfeng Zhuo,Vincent Zhang,Xiao Bai,Jinchao Li,Karthik Iyer,Zihao Fan,Yilun Xu,Yiwen Chen,Peicheng Yu,Manish Malik,Neil Shah*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 论文探讨了在Snapchat推荐系统中应用语义ID作为辅助特征和检索源的实际技术挑战、实验和设计选择，展示了其优于传统原子ID的性能提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统的原子ID虽然能编码协同过滤信号，但存在基数大、缺乏语义聚类的问题。语义ID通过有序代码列表提供更小基数、语义聚类的表示，有望提升推荐系统的效果。

Method: 采用残差量化等分词器从基础模型或协同信号中提取语义表示，生成有序代码列表作为语义ID。将其作为排序模型的辅助特征，并探索作为不同ML应用中的额外检索源。

Result: 在内部数据和学术基准测试中获得了有前景的离线结果，在线A/B测试显示语义ID变体在多个生产模型中部署后带来了积极的指标影响。

Conclusion: 语义ID是推荐系统中有效的项目标识符范式，通过解决实际技术挑战并优化设计选择，能够在生产环境中实现显著的性能提升。

Abstract: Effective item identifiers (IDs) are an important component for recommender systems (RecSys) in practice, and are commonly adopted in many use cases such as retrieval and ranking. IDs can encode collaborative filtering signals within training data, such that RecSys models can extrapolate during the inference and personalize the prediction based on users' behavioral histories. Recently, Semantic IDs (SIDs) have become a trending paradigm for RecSys. In comparison to the conventional atomic ID, an SID is an ordered list of codes, derived from tokenizers such as residual quantization, applied to semantic representations commonly extracted from foundation models or collaborative signals. SIDs have drastically smaller cardinality than the atomic counterpart, and induce semantic clustering in the ID space. At Snapchat, we apply SIDs as auxiliary features for ranking models, and also explore SIDs as additional retrieval sources in different ML applications. In this paper, we discuss practical technical challenges we encountered while applying SIDs, experiments we have conducted, and design choices we have iterated to mitigate these challenges. Backed by promising offline results on both internal data and academic benchmarks as well as online A/B studies, SID variants have been launched in multiple production models with positive metrics impact.

</details>


### [442] [MisEdu-RAG: A Misconception-Aware Dual-Hypergraph RAG for Novice Math Teachers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04036)
*Zhihan Guo,Rundong Xue,Yuting Lu,Jionghao Lin*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: MisEdu-RAG：基于双超图的检索增强生成框架，通过概念超图和实例超图组织教学知识，为数学教师提供针对学生错误的具体诊断和教学建议。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 新手数学教师难以诊断和纠正学生的错误，特别是误解类错误。现有LLM平台虽然能提供教学反馈，但教学知识与学生错误之间的连接松散，导致指导不够具体可行。

Method: 提出MisEdu-RAG框架，采用双超图结构：概念超图组织教学知识，实例超图收集真实学生错误案例。通过两阶段检索从两个层面收集相关证据，基于检索到的案例和教学原则生成响应。

Result: 在MisstepMath数据集上评估，相比基线模型，token-F1提升10.95%，五维响应质量最高提升15.3%，在多样性和赋能维度提升最大。对221名教师的问卷调查和6名新手的访谈证实了其在实际应用中的有效性。

Conclusion: MisEdu-RAG能够为高需求误解场景提供诊断结果和具体教学策略，展示了在可扩展教师培训和AI辅助误解处理方面的强大潜力。

Abstract: Novice math teachers often encounter students' mistakes that are difficult to diagnose and remediate. Misconceptions are especially challenging because teachers must explain what went wrong and how to solve them. Although many existing large language model (LLM) platforms can assist in generating instructional feedback, these LLMs loosely connect pedagogical knowledge and student mistakes, which might make the guidance less actionable for teachers. To address this gap, we propose MisEdu-RAG, a dual-hypergraph-based retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) framework that organizes pedagogical knowledge as a concept hypergraph and real student mistake cases as an instance hypergraph. Given a query, MisEdu-RAG performs a two-stage retrieval to gather connected evidence from both layers and generates a response grounded in the retrieved cases and pedagogical principles. We evaluate on \textit{MisstepMath}, a dataset of math mistakes paired with teacher solutions, as a benchmark for misconception-aware retrieval and response generation across topics and error types. Evaluation results on \textit{MisstepMath} show that, compared with baseline models, MisEdu-RAG improves token-F1 by 10.95\% and yields up to 15.3\% higher five-dimension response quality, with the largest gains on \textit{Diversity} and \textit{Empowerment}. To verify its applicability in practical use, we further conduct a pilot study through a questionnaire survey of 221 teachers and interviews with 6 novices. The findings suggest that MisEdu-RAG provides diagnosis results and concrete teaching moves for high-demand misconception scenarios. Overall, MisEdu-RAG demonstrates strong potential for scalable teacher training and AI-assisted instruction for misconception handling. Our code is available on GitHub: https://github.com/GEMLab-HKU/MisEdu-RAG.

</details>


### [443] [FLAME: Condensing Ensemble Diversity into a Single Network for Efficient Sequential Recommendation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04038)
*WooJoo Kim,JunYoung Kim,JaeHyung Lim,SeongJin Choi,SeongKu Kang,HwanJo Yu*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: FLAME提出了一种新颖的序列推荐框架，通过冻结和可学习网络的对齐模块化集成，将集成级别的多样性压缩到单个网络中，实现高效推荐。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统序列推荐中，单一网络难以捕捉用户多样行为，而集成方法虽然能缓解这一问题，但训练多个网络从头开始计算成本高，且噪声相互监督会导致不稳定。

Method: FLAME采用模块化集成方法：将每个网络分解为子模块（如层或块），动态组合生成丰富的表示模式。预训练并冻结一个网络作为语义锚点，通过引导式相互学习将多样表示对齐到可学习网络的空间中。

Result: 在六个数据集上的实验表明，FLAME优于最先进的基线方法，收敛速度提升高达7.69倍，NDCG@20指标提升9.70%。推理时仅使用可学习网络，实现零开销的集成级别性能。

Conclusion: FLAME成功将集成级别的多样性压缩到单个网络中，实现了高效且稳定的序列推荐，解决了传统集成方法计算成本高和训练不稳定的问题。

Abstract: Sequential recommendation requires capturing diverse user behaviors, which a single network often fails to capture. While ensemble methods mitigate this by leveraging multiple networks, training them all from scratch leads to high computational cost and instability from noisy mutual supervision. We propose {\bf F}rozen and {\bf L}earnable networks with {\bf A}ligned {\bf M}odular {\bf E}nsemble ({\bf FLAME}), a novel framework that condenses ensemble-level diversity into a single network for efficient sequential recommendation. During training, FLAME simulates exponential diversity using only two networks via {\it modular ensemble}. By decomposing each network into sub-modules (e.g., layers or blocks) and dynamically combining them, FLAME generates a rich space of diverse representation patterns. To stabilize this process, we pretrain and freeze one network to serve as a semantic anchor and employ {\it guided mutual learning}. This aligns the diverse representations into the space of the remaining learnable network, ensuring robust optimization. Consequently, at inference, FLAME utilizes only the learnable network, achieving ensemble-level performance with zero overhead compared to a single network. Experiments on six datasets show that FLAME outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, achieving up to 7.69$\times$ faster convergence and 9.70\% improvement in NDCG@20. We provide the source code of FLAME at https://github.com/woo-joo/FLAME_SIGIR26.

</details>


### [444] [Formalized Information Needs Improve Large-Language-Model Relevance Judgments](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04140)
*Jüri Keller,Maik Fröbe,Björn Engelmann,Fabian Haak,Timo Breuer,Birger Larsen,Philipp Schaer*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: LLM作为相关性评估者时，使用形式化的信息需求（主题）能提高评估可靠性，减少相关文档数量，增加评估一致性，即使合成主题与人工主题不完全相似。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统Cranfield式检索评估中，相关文档过多或过少以及评估者间一致性低会影响可靠性。人类评估通常使用形式化主题来避免这些问题，但新兴的LLM评估方法往往只使用查询，可能降低可靠性。需要研究LLM评估者是否也能从形式化信息需求中受益。

Method: 使用LLM将信息需求合成形式化为主题（包含描述和叙述），遵循先前人工相关性评估的结构。在Robust04和TREC Deep Learning 2019/2020数据集上，比较使用合成形式化主题的评估者与仅使用查询的默认LLM评估者。

Result: 未形式化的评估者判断更多文档相关且一致性较低，导致检索评估可靠性降低。形式化主题提高了人工与LLM相关性判断之间的一致性，即使主题与人工版本不完全相似。

Conclusion: LLM相关性评估者应像人工评估一样使用形式化信息需求，当没有人工形式化时，应合成形式化主题以提高评估可靠性。

Abstract: Cranfield-style retrieval evaluations with too few or too many relevant documents or with low inter-assessor agreement on relevance can reduce the reliability of observations. In evaluations with human assessors, information needs are often formalized as retrieval topics to avoid an excessive number of relevant documents while maintaining good agreement. However, emerging evaluation setups that use Large Language Models (LLMs) as relevance assessors often use only queries, potentially decreasing the reliability. To study whether LLM relevance assessors benefit from formalized information needs, we synthetically formalize information needs with LLMs into topics that follow the established structure from previous human relevance assessments (i.e., descriptions and narratives). We compare assessors using synthetically formalized topics against the LLM-default query-only assessor on Robust04 and the 2019/2020 editions of TREC Deep Learning. We find that assessors without formalization judge many more documents relevant and have a lower agreement, leading to reduced reliability in retrieval evaluations. Furthermore, we show that the formalized topics improve agreement between human and LLM relevance judgments, even when the topics are not highly similar to their human counterparts. Our findings indicate that LLM relevance assessors should use formalized information needs, as is standard for human assessment, and synthetically formalize topics when no human formalization exists to improve evaluation reliability.

</details>


### [445] [A Logical-Rule Autoencoder for Interpretable Recommendations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04270)
*Jinhao Pan,Bowen Wei,Ziwei Zhu*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 提出LIA（逻辑规则可解释自编码器），通过可学习的逻辑规则层实现协同过滤推荐系统的内在可解释性，在保持高性能的同时提供人类可读的决策规则。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前深度学习推荐模型大多作为黑箱运行，依赖潜在表示而缺乏内在可解释性，这在需要透明度和问责制的应用中存在问题。

Method: 设计逻辑规则可解释自编码器（LIA），引入可学习的逻辑规则层，每个规则神经元配备门参数自动选择AND或OR运算符，通过连接权重的符号编码否定操作，实现参数高效的逻辑模式发现。

Result: 实验表明LIA在推荐性能上优于传统基线方法，同时保持完全可解释性，能够学习明确的人类可读重建规则。

Conclusion: LIA通过设计实现内在可解释性，在提升推荐性能的同时提供透明决策过程，解决了深度学习推荐模型的黑箱问题。

Abstract: Most deep learning recommendation models operate as black boxes, relying on latent representations that obscure their decision process. This lack of intrinsic interpretability raises concerns in applications that require transparency and accountability. In this work, we propose a Logical-rule Interpretable Autoencoder (LIA) for collaborative filtering that is interpretable by design. LIA introduces a learnable logical rule layer in which each rule neuron is equipped with a gate parameter that automatically selects between AND and OR operators during training, enabling the model to discover diverse logical patterns directly from data. To support functional completeness without doubling the input dimensionality, LIA encodes negation through the sign of connection weights, providing a parameter-efficient mechanism for expressing both positive and negated item conditions within each rule. By learning explicit, human-readable reconstruction rules, LIA allows users to directly trace the decision process behind each recommendation. Extensive experiments show that our method achieves improved recommendation performance over traditional baselines while remaining fully interpretable. Code and data are available at https://github.com/weibowen555/LIA.

</details>


### [446] [FAVE: Flow-based Average Velocity Establishment for Sequential Recommendation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04427)
*Ke Shi,Yao Zhang,Feng Guo,Jinyuan Zhang,JunShuo Zhang,Shen Gao,Shuo Shang*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: Fave框架通过两阶段训练实现一步生成推荐：第一阶段建立稳定的偏好空间，第二阶段引入语义锚点先验和全局平均速度，解决传统流方法中的先验不匹配和线性冗余问题，显著提升推理效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统基于流的推荐方法存在"噪声到数据"范式的两个关键低效问题：先验不匹配（从无信息噪声开始生成，需要漫长恢复轨迹）和线性冗余（迭代求解器在建模确定性偏好转换上浪费计算资源）。需要开发更高效的生成推荐方法。

Method: 提出Fave框架，采用渐进式两阶段训练策略：第一阶段通过双端语义对齐建立稳定的偏好空间，防止表示坍塌；第二阶段引入语义锚点先验（从用户交互历史的掩码嵌入初始化），学习全局平均速度将多步轨迹整合为单个位移向量，并通过JVP一致性约束确保轨迹直线性，实现一步生成。

Result: 在三个基准测试上的广泛实验表明，Fave不仅实现了最先进的推荐性能，而且在推理效率上实现了数量级的提升，适用于延迟敏感场景。

Conclusion: Fave框架通过解决传统流方法的效率瓶颈，实现了高效的一步生成推荐，为顺序推荐中的动态用户意图建模提供了实用解决方案。

Abstract: Generative recommendation has emerged as a transformative paradigm for capturing the dynamic evolution of user intents in sequential recommendation. While flow-based methods improve the efficiency of diffusion models, they remain hindered by the ``Noise-to-Data'' paradigm, which introduces two critical inefficiencies: prior mismatch, where generation starts from uninformative noise, forcing a lengthy recovery trajectory; and linear redundancy, where iterative solvers waste computation on modeling deterministic preference transitions. To address these limitations, we propose a Flow-based Average Velocity Establishment (Fave) framework for one-step generation recommendation that learns a direct trajectory from an informative prior to the target distribution. Fave is structured via a progressive two-stage training strategy. In Stage 1, we establish a stable preference space through dual-end semantic alignment, applying constraints at both the source (user history) and target (next item) to prevent representation collapse. In Stage 2, we directly resolve the efficiency bottlenecks by introducing a semantic anchor prior, which initializes the flow with a masked embedding from the user's interaction history, providing an informative starting point. Then we learn a global average velocity, consolidating the multi-step trajectory into a single displacement vector, and enforce trajectory straightness via a JVP-based consistency constraint to ensure one-step generation. Extensive experiments on three benchmarks demonstrate that Fave not only achieves state-of-the-art recommendation performance but also delivers an order-of-magnitude improvement in inference efficiency, making it practical for latency-sensitive scenarios.

</details>


### [447] [Retrieval Augmented Conversational Recommendation with Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04457)
*Zhenrui Yue,Honglei Zhuang,Zhen Qin,Zhankui He,Huimin Zeng,Julian McAuley,Dong Wang*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 提出RAR框架：两阶段检索增强对话推荐系统，通过强化学习对齐检索与生成，解决LLM推荐中的新物品和事实性问题


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM对话推荐系统依赖预训练知识，缺乏外部检索机制处理新物品，且缺少统一语料库支持检索增强

Method: 构建大规模电影语料库（30万+电影含元数据），提出两阶段RAR框架：检索模型生成候选，LLM结合对话上下文精炼推荐，引入基于LLM反馈的强化学习对齐检索与生成

Result: RAR在多个基准测试中持续超越最先进基线方法，有效减少幻觉，提升推荐事实性和性能

Conclusion: RAR是首个动态桥接检索与生成的两阶段对话推荐框架，通过强化学习反馈循环和事实元数据基础，显著提升推荐系统的事实准确性和上下文感知能力

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) exhibit enhanced capabilities in language understanding and generation. By utilizing their embedded knowledge, LLMs are increasingly used as conversational recommender systems (CRS), achieving improved performance across diverse scenarios. However, existing LLM-based methods rely on pretrained knowledge without external retrieval mechanisms for novel items. Additionally, the lack of a unified corpus poses challenges for integrating retrieval augmentation into CRS. Motivated by these challenges, we present RAR, a novel two-stage retrieval augmented conversational recommendation framework that aligns retrieval and generation to enhance both performance and factuality. To support this framework and provide a unified corpus, we construct a large-scale movie corpus, comprising over 300k movies with rich metadata, such as titles, casts and plot summaries. Leveraging this data, our primary contribution is RAR, the first framework to departs from standard two-stage CRS by dynamically bridging retrieval and generation. First, a retriever model generates candidate items based on user history; in the subsequent stage, an LLM refines the recommendations by incorporating conversational context with retrieved results. In addition, we introduce a novel reinforcement learning (RL) method that leverages LLM feedback to iteratively update the retriever. By creating a collaborative feedback loop that reinforces sampled candidate sets with higher ranking metrics, RAR effectively mitigates the misalignment between the retrieval and generation stages. Furthermore, grounding the LLM in factual metadata allows our RL-driven approach to capture subtle user intentions and generate context-aware recommendations with reduced hallucinations. We validate our approach through extensive experiments on multiple benchmarks, where RAR consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baseline methods.

</details>


### [448] [SLSREC: Self-Supervised Contrastive Learning for Adaptive Fusion of Long- and Short-Term User Interests](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04530)
*Wei Zhou,Yue Shen,Junkai Ji,Yinglan Feng,Xing Tang,Xiuqiang He,Liang Feng,Zexuan Zhu*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: SLSRec：一种基于会话的长短期兴趣融合推荐模型，通过自监督学习框架解耦长短期兴趣，使用对比学习校准表示，并通过注意力融合网络自适应聚合，显著提升推荐性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 用户兴趣包含长期偏好和短期意图，具有动态性。用户交互的时间分布不均匀，兴趣模式不断演变，而传统模型将长短期兴趣合并为单一表示会损害推荐准确性，需要更有效的方法来捕捉兴趣的时间动态变化。

Method: 提出SLSRec模型：1）按时间分割历史行为来捕捉兴趣动态；2）使用自监督学习框架解耦长短期兴趣；3）引入对比学习策略校准长短期兴趣表示；4）设计基于注意力的融合网络自适应聚合兴趣表示。

Result: 在三个公共基准数据集上的广泛实验表明，SLSRec始终优于最先进的模型，并在各种场景下表现出卓越的鲁棒性。

Conclusion: SLSRec通过解耦和融合长短期兴趣，有效捕捉用户兴趣的时间动态，显著提升推荐性能，为处理用户兴趣演变提供了有效的解决方案。

Abstract: User interests typically encompass both long-term preferences and short-term intentions, reflecting the dynamic nature of user behaviors across different timeframes. The uneven temporal distribution of user interactions highlights the evolving patterns of interests, making it challenging to accurately capture shifts in interests using comprehensive historical behaviors. To address this, we propose SLSRec, a novel Session-based model with the fusion of Long- and Short-term Recommendations that effectively captures the temporal dynamics of user interests by segmenting historical behaviors over time. Unlike conventional models that combine long- and short-term user interests into a single representation, compromising recommendation accuracy, SLSRec utilizes a self-supervised learning framework to disentangle these two types of interests. A contrastive learning strategy is introduced to ensure accurate calibration of long- and short-term interest representations. Additionally, an attention-based fusion network is designed to adaptively aggregate interest representations, optimizing their integration to enhance recommendation performance. Extensive experiments on three public benchmark datasets demonstrate that SLSRec consistently outperforms state-of-the-art models while exhibiting superior robustness across various scenarios.We will release all source code upon acceptance.

</details>


### [449] [Ruling Out to Rule In: Contrastive Hypothesis Retrieval for Medical Question Answering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04593)
*Byeolhee Kim,Min-Kyung Kim,Young-Hak Kim,Tae-Joon Jeon*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: CHR框架通过生成目标假设和模仿假设，在医学RAG系统中显式地避免临床上相似的错误答案，显著提升检索质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准检索器在医学RAG中经常检索到与查询语义相近但临床条件不同的"硬负例"，这些临床上合理的模仿诊断会掩盖实际诊断，特别是在语料库中这些模仿诊断占主导地位时。

Method: 提出对比假设检索（CHR）框架，受临床鉴别诊断过程启发：1）为目标正确答案生成目标假设H+；2）为最可能的错误替代方案生成模仿假设H-；3）通过提升H+对齐证据并惩罚H-对齐内容来给文档评分。

Result: 在三个医学QA基准测试和三个答案生成器上，CHR在所有配置中都优于五个基线方法，比次优方法提升高达10.4个百分点。在587个案例中，85.2%的CHR正确案例与基线方法的前5检索列表没有共享文档，表明是实质性的检索重定向而非轻微重新排序。

Conclusion: 通过显式建模要避免的内容和要寻找的内容，CHR将临床推理与检索机制设计相结合，为减少医学RAG系统中的硬负例污染提供了实用路径。
